# NOTE: This is a safety-focused version of the MMR template.
# CSF HS (primary efficacy), Serum NfL (secondary efficacy), and
# Clinical Outcome Assessment results (exploratory efficacy) have been removed.
# Urine HS is included per medical monitor direction.
# Reference: Protocol DNLI-I-0001 V6, Section 9.1

---
title: ""
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    number-sections: true
    geometry: a4paper, margin=0.5in
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    # toc: true 
    # toc-depth: 6
    # toc-title: "Table of Contents" 
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{lscape}
  - \newcommand{\blandscape}{\begin{landscape}}
  - \newcommand{\elandscape}{\end{landscape}}
  - \pagestyle{plain}
  # - \usepackage{draftwatermark}
  # - \SetWatermarkText{DRAFT}
  # - \SetWatermarkScale{1.2}
  # - \SetWatermarkLightness{0.9}
editor: visual
---

```{=latex}
\pagenumbering{gobble}
```

\vspace{1cm}

![](denali.jpg){fig-align="center"}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

snapshot <- "2026-02-25"

safetylab_dt <- "2026-02-13"
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # csf_dt <- "2025-07-18"

urine_dt <- "2025-07-18"

ada_dt <- "2026-02-20"

irt_current <- "DNLI-I-0001_PROD_01FEB2026.csv"
irt_current_dt <- "2026-02-01"
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # qs_current <- "DNLI-I-0001_MEDAVANTE-PROPHASE_QS_20260210.xpt"
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # qs_current_dt <- "2026-02-10"
 
pd_current <- "DNLI-I-0001_Deviations_PD Review 05Dec25-12Jan26.xlsx" 
pd_current_dt <- "2026-01"

```

```{=latex}
{
\thispagestyle{empty}

\begin{center}

\vspace{2cm}

\Huge \textbf{MEDICAL MONITORING REPORT [FEB 2026]}

\vspace{1cm}

\Huge \textbf{DNL-126 [I-0001]}

\end{center}

\vspace{1em}

\Large
\begin{flushleft}
\textbf{Input data:}

\textbf{EDC} \\
Current review cycle snapshot date: \textbf{\texttt{`r snapshot`}} \\

\vspace{1em}

\textbf{PD log} \\
Current review cycle: \textbf{\texttt{`r pd_current_dt`}} \\

\vspace{1em}

\textbf{Safety Lab} \\
MLM data transfer: \textbf{\texttt{`r safetylab_dt`}} \\

\vspace{1em}

\textbf{IRT} \\
4G Clinical data tranafer: \textbf{\texttt{`r irt_current_dt`}} \\

\vspace{1em}

\textbf{Urine Biomarkers} \\
Frontage Urine data transfer: \textbf{\texttt{`r urine_dt`}} \\

\vspace{1em}

\textbf{Anti Drug Antibodies} \\
Bioagilytix data transfer: \textbf{\texttt{`r ada_dt`}} \\

% EXCLUDED - efficacy % Clinical Outcomes section removed
\end{flushleft}

\vfill

\begin{center}
\textcolor{red}{\textbf{\textit{Confidential Study Report}}}
\end{center}
}
```

\newpage

```{=latex}
{
\thispagestyle{empty}

{\LARGE \textbf{Planned doses in Study Cohorts (Protocol V6)} \par}

\subsection*{Cohort A1}
\begin{itemize}
  \item 3 mg/kg QW at Weeks 1 and 2, followed by 10 mg/kg at Week 3 administered Q2W for at least 12 doses.
  \item Once the target dose has been determined, participants will be switched to the target dose after Week 25 or later.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Cohort A2}
\begin{itemize}
  \item 3 mg/kg QW at Weeks 1 and 2, followed by 3 mg/kg at Week 3 administered Q2W for up to 12 doses.
  \item The dose level and/or dosing frequency may be increased to 6 mg/kg and subsequently to 10 mg/kg QW (pending satisfactory safety review by the DEC), as described in the protocol.
  \item Once the target dose has been determined, participants will be switched to the target dose after Week 25 or later.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Cohort A3}
\begin{itemize}
  \item The starting dose in Cohort A3 is 3 mg/kg QW for at least six doses.
  \item Dose will then be increased to 6 mg/kg QW for at least six doses and subsequently be increased to 10 mg/kg QW, as described in the protocol.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Cohort B1}
\begin{itemize}
  \item 3 mg/kg QW for at least six doses, followed by 6 mg/kg QW for at least six doses, followed by 10 mg/kg QW, as described in the protocol.
\end{itemize}

\subsection*{Cohort B2}
\begin{itemize}
  \item 3 mg/kg QW for at least six doses, followed by 6 mg/kg QW for at least six doses, followed by 10 mg/kg QW, as described in the protocol.
\end{itemize}
}
```

![](images/Schema.png)

```{r, include=FALSE}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(haven)
library(labelled)
library(here)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(admiral)
library(sdtm.oak)
library(rtables)
library(rtables.officer)
library(tern)
library(janitor)
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(flextable)
library(huxtable)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(simplermarkdown)
library(parseLatex)
library(ggforce)
library(patchwork)
library(forcats)
library(sjlabelled)
library(boxr)

source(paste0(here(), "/utils/utils.R"))
box_auth()

# EG Reference Ranges
egrange <- read_excel(paste0(here(), "/documents/I1 Specs.xlsx"),
                      sheet = "ADEG_RANGE")

# VS Reference Ranges
vsrange <- read_excel(paste0(here(), "/documents/I1 Specs.xlsx"),
                      sheet = "ADVS_RANGE")

# BM Visit Window
bmwin <- read_excel(paste0(here(), "/documents/I1 Specs.xlsx"),
                    sheet = "ADBM_Visit_Windows")

# SOA
soa <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/SOA.csv")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# IRT 
irt <- read.csv(paste0(here(),"/data/", irt_current)) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Demographic
dm <- read_sas(paste0(here(),"/data/edc/dm.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Enrollment
enroll <- read_sas(paste0(here(),"/data/edc/enroll.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Inclusion/Exclusion
ie <- read_sas(paste0(here(),"/data/edc/ie.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# AE
ae <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/ae.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# IRR
irr <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/irr.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Exposure
ex <- bind_rows(read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/ex.sas7bdat")) |> 
                          mutate(SOURCE = "EX"),
                        read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/exiv1.sas7bdat")) |> 
                          mutate(SOURCE = "EXIV1")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na() |> 
  filter(!is.na(EXDOSE)) |> 
  mutate(FolderName = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", FolderName), "Week 25", FolderName),
         FolderName = ifelse(FolderName %in% "Week", InstanceName, FolderName),
         EXSTDAT = as.Date(EXSTDAT))

# End of Study/Treatment
eos <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/eos.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na() |> 
  filter(!grepl("Week 25", FolderName) & 
           !grepl("Screen Failure", DSDECODS) &
           !is.na(DSDECODS)) |> 
  rename("DSSTDAT1" = "DSSTDAT") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DSSSTAT1, DSSTDAT1)
  
eot <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/eot.sas7bdat"))  |> convert_blanks_to_na() 

# Vital Signs
vs <- read_sas(paste0(here(),"/data/edc/vs.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na() |> 
  mutate(VSDAT = as.Date(VSDAT))

# Safety lab
local_lab <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/lab.sas7bdat")) |>
  mutate(`Local/Central` = "Local")

central_lab <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/mlm_dnli-i-0001_safety.csv"))

# Protocol Deviation
dv <- read_excel(paste0(here(),"/data/", pd_current)) |> 
  rename(Important = "Significant/Important",
         # Violation = "Marked as Violation (Siebel)",
         Subject = "Subject #") 

# ECG
ecg <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/eg1.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# Conmed
cm <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/cm.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# MH
mh <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/mh.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# COA
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # vin3 <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/vabs3.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # bsi3 <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/bsidiii.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # bsi4 <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/bsid.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # kauf <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/kabc.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# ABR 
abr <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/abr.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Abdomen MRI
vol <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/Clario_DNLI_I_0001_Organ_Vol.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# Brain MRI
brn <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/CLARIO_DNLI_I_0001_vMRI.sas7bdat")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # # CSF HS
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # csfhs <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/frontage_dnli-i-0001_CSF_HS_DS.csv")) |>
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   convert_blanks_to_na()

# Urine HS
urhs <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/frontage_dnli-i-0001_urine_hs_ds.csv")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# Urine Creatinine
urcrea <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/frontage_dnli-i-0001_urine_creatinine.csv")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na()

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # # QS
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # qs <- read_xpt(paste0(here(), "/data/", qs_current)) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# ADA
ada <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/bioagilytix_dnli-i-0001_ada.csv")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Disease Characteristics
dc <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/dc1.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Genotype
geno <- read_csv(paste0(here(), "/data/ggc_dnli-i-0001_sgsh.csv")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Date of Visit
dov <- read_sas(paste0(here(), "/data/edc/dov.sas7bdat")) |> convert_blanks_to_na()

# Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Description
ie_desc <- read.csv(paste0(here(), "/data/IE_Description.csv")) |> 
  convert_blanks_to_na() |> 
  mutate(across(everything(), as.character))
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# Fixing any Data Issues
ex <- ex |> 
  filter(EXDOSE %in% c(3, 6, 10))


ex_EXSTDT <- ex |>
  filter(EXOCCUR_STD == "Y") |>
  mutate(EXSTDTC = paste0(EXSTDAT, "T", EXSTTIM),
         TRTSDT = as.Date(EXSTDAT),
         TRTSDTM = as.POSIXct(EXSTDTC, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M")
         ) |>
  arrange(Subject, TRTSDT, TRTSDTM) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |>
  slice_head() |>
  ungroup() |> 
  select(Subject, TRTSDT, TRTSDTM)

vs <- vs |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) 

dov <- dov |> 
  mutate(FolderName = ifelse(FolderName %in% "Week", InstanceName, FolderName))
  
```

\newpage

\tableofcontents

```{=latex}
\clearpage
\setcounter{page}{1}
\pagenumbering{arabic}
```

## Study Status

### Cumulative Accrual Enrollment

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
cum <- enroll |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT)) |> 
  mutate(DSSTDAT = as.Date(DSSTDAT, format = "%d%b%Y:%H:%M:%S.%OS"),
         EnrollMonth = format(DSSTDAT, "%Y-%m"),
         Q = case_when(DSSTDAT_MM <= 3 ~ "Q1",
                       DSSTDAT_MM > 3 &  DSSTDAT_MM <= 6 ~ "Q2",
                       DSSTDAT_MM > 6 &  DSSTDAT_MM <= 9 ~ "Q3",
                       DSSTDAT_MM > 9 ~ "Q4",
                       TRUE ~ "ND"),
         QUARTER = paste0(as.character(DSSTDAT_YYYY), "-", Q)
         ) |> 
  arrange(QUARTER )


# Count unique subjects per Site per Month
quarter_enroll <- cum |>
  group_by(Site, QUARTER) |>
  summarise(N = n_distinct(Subject), .groups = "drop") |> 
  ungroup()

# Complete missing months per site with 0
quarter_enroll <- quarter_enroll |>
  tidyr::complete(Site, QUARTER, fill = list(N = 0)) |>
  arrange(Site, QUARTER) |> 
  left_join(cum |>
              distinct(Site, SiteNumber))

# Calculate cumulative sum per site
quarter_cumulative <- quarter_enroll |>
  group_by(Site) |>
  mutate(CumulativeN = cumsum(N)) |>
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(SiteNumber = as.character(SiteNumber))

# Pivot to wide format for reporting
cumulative_table <- quarter_cumulative |>
  select(Site, SiteNumber, QUARTER, N) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = QUARTER, values_from = N, values_fill = 0) |>
  group_by(Site) |> 
  mutate(`Total` = sum(c_across(where(is.numeric)), na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  arrange(desc(`Total`))
```

```{r ft.align = "left"}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

kable(cumulative_table,
      align = rep("c", ncol(cumulative_table))) |> 
  row_spec(0,bold=TRUE) |> 
  kable_styling(font_size = 9, latex_options = "striped") |> 
  column_spec(1, width = "3cm")
```

\vspace{0.5cm}

### Participant Disposition

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

dsole <- ex |> 
  filter(EXOCCUR == "Yes" & parse_number(InstanceName)> 25 & parse_number(InstanceName)< 97) |> 
  distinct(Subject) |> 
  mutate(DSOLE = "Yes")

dslte <- ex |> 
  filter(EXOCCUR == "Yes" & parse_number(InstanceName)> 97) |> 
  distinct(Subject) |> 
  mutate(DSLTE = "Yes")

irt1 <- irt |> 
  select(COHORT, Subject = PATID, VISDAT, Status = SUBSTA) |> 
  mutate(VISDAT = as.Date(VISDAT, format = "%d-%b-%Y")) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(COHORT, Subject, VISDAT) |> 
  group_by(COHORT, Subject) |> 
  slice_tail(n =1) |> 
  ungroup()

scr <- dm |>
  inner_join(irt1 |> 
              select(COHORT, Subject, Status) |> 
              mutate(Status = case_when(Status == "Screen Failed" ~ "Screen Failure",
                                        Status %in% c("Screened", "Rescreened") ~ "In Screening",
                                        Status == "Enrolled" ~ "Eligible",
                                        TRUE ~ "Other"),
                     USUBJID = Subject
                     )
            ) |> 
  left_join(eot |> select(Subject, DSSSTAT, DSSTDAT))  |>  
  left_join(eos) |> 
  left_join(dsole) |> 
  left_join(dslte) |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT |> select(Subject, TRTSDT)) |> 
  left_join(enroll |> select(Subject, COHORT1 = COHORT)) |> 
  mutate(COHORT = ifelse(is.na(COHORT), COHORT1, COHORT),
         Status = ifelse(Status %in% "In Screening" & !is.na(TRTSDT), "Eligible", Status),
         Status = factor(Status, levels = c("In Screening",
                                            "Screen Failure",
                                            "Eligible",
                                            "Other ")
                                     ),
         Current = case_when(DSLTE %in% "Yes" ~ "Long Term Extension",
                             DSOLE %in% "Yes" ~ "Open-Label Extension",
                             Status %in% "Eligible" ~ "Core Study",
                             TRUE ~ NA_character_)
         ) 

#BRTHDT
scr <- scr |> 
  mutate(BRTHDT = as.Date(RFICDAT) %m-% months(AGEM) |>
           rollbackward(roll_to_first = TRUE))
   
safflds <- scr |> # Safety Population
  filter(!is.na(TRTSDT)) |> 
  distinct(COHORT, Subject, USUBJID)

cohfact <- distinct(safflds, COHORT) |> arrange(COHORT) |> pull()

# Initialize summary list
summary_rows <- list()

# Screening Status categories
screening_values <- c("In Screening", "Screen Failure", "Eligible", "Other")
for (val in screening_values) {
  summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
    Category = "Screening Status",
    Subcategory = val,
    Total = sum(scr$Status == val, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
}

# Enrollment Status
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Enrollment Status",
  Subcategory = "Pending Enrolment",
  Total = sum(scr$Status == "Eligible" & is.na(scr$COHORT))
)

summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Enrollment Status",
  Subcategory = "Enrolled",
  Total = sum(scr$Status == "Eligible" & !is.na(scr$COHORT))
)

# Early Termination Prior to Treatment
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Early Termination Prior to Treatment",
  Subcategory = "",
  Total = sum(scr$Status == "Eligible" & scr$DSSSTAT == "Early discontinued from treatment", na.rm = TRUE)
)

# Treatment Initiated
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Treatment Initiated",
  Subcategory = "",
  Total = sum(!is.na(scr$TRTSDT))
)

# Active on/off study drug
active_on <- sum(!is.na(scr$TRTSDT) & 
                   !(!is.na(scr$DSSSTAT) & 
                       scr$DSSSTAT == "Early discontinued from treatment"), 
                 na.rm = TRUE)
active_off <- sum(!is.na(scr$TRTSDT)) - active_on

summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Participants Treated",
  Subcategory = "Active on study drug",
  Total = active_on
)
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Participants Treated",
  Subcategory = "Active off study drug",
  Total = active_off
)

# Consented for OLE
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Consented for Open-Label Extension",
  Subcategory = "",
  Total = sum(scr$DSOLE == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
)

# Consented for OLE
summary_rows[[length(summary_rows)+1]] <- list(
  Category = "Consented for Long Term Extension",
  Subcategory = "",
  Total = sum(scr$DSLTE == "Yes", na.rm = TRUE)
)

# Convert to data frame
summary_df <- bind_rows(summary_rows) |> distinct()

sstat <- bind_rows(data.frame("Subcategory" = "Screening Status", "Total" = NA),
                    summary_df |> 
                     filter(Category %in% "Screening Status") |> 
                     select(Subcategory, Total) |> 
                     mutate(Subcategory = paste0("  ", Subcategory)))
estat <- bind_rows(data.frame("Subcategory" = "Enrollment Status", "Total" = NA),
                    summary_df |> 
                     filter(Category %in% "Enrollment Status") |> 
                     select(Subcategory, Total) |> 
                     mutate(Subcategory = paste0("  ", Subcategory)))
eter <- summary_df |> filter(Category %in% "Early Termination Prior to Treatment") |> 
  select(Subcategory = Category, Total)
tint <- summary_df |> filter(Category %in% "Treatment Initiated") |> 
  select(Subcategory = Category, Total)
act <- bind_rows(data.frame("Subcategory" = "Participants Treated", "Total" = NA),
                    summary_df |> 
                     filter(Category %in% "Participants Treated") |> 
                     select(Subcategory, Total) |> 
                     mutate(Subcategory = paste0("  ", Subcategory)))
consol <- summary_df |> filter(Category %in% "Consented for Open-Label Extension") |> 
  select(Subcategory = Category, Total)
conslt <- summary_df |> filter(Category %in% "Consented for Long Term Extension") |> 
  select(Subcategory = Category, Total)

summary_df1 <- bind_rows(sstat, estat, eter, tint, act, consol, conslt) |> 
  rename("Study Status" = "Subcategory") |> 
  mutate(Total = as.character(Total),
         Total = ifelse(is.na(Total), "", Total))

summary_df1[[1]] <- style_latex_indent_or_bold(summary_df1[[1]])

colnames(summary_df1) <- paste0("\\textbf{", colnames(summary_df1), "}")
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

summary_df1 %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        format = "latex",
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))) %>%
  kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position", "striped"),
                full_width = FALSE,
                font_size = 10)
```

\vspace{0.5cm}

\newpage

```{=latex}
\blandscape
```

### Screen Failures

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
sf <- scr |> 
  filter(Status == "Screen Failure") |> 
  left_join(ie |>
              mutate(PV = ifelse(!is.na(CURPRTV), paste0("PV", CURPRTV), NA_character_),
                     CURPRTV = as.character(CURPRTV),
                     IECAT = ifelse(!is.na(IECAT_STD) & !is.na(PV), 
                                    paste(PV, IECAT_STD, paste0("#", IETESTCD)), 
                                    NA_character_),
                     IETESTCD = as.character(IETESTCD)) |> 
              filter(!is.na(IECAT)) |> 
              left_join(ie_desc, by = c("CURPRTV", "IECAT_STD", "IETESTCD")) |> 
              select(Subject, IECAT, Description), 
            by = "Subject") |> 
  mutate(`Age at screening (Y:M)` = str_c(AGE, ":", AGEM-(AGE*12)),
         Country = "USA",
         IECAT = ifelse(is.na(IECAT), "", IECAT)) |>
  select(`Participant ID` = Subject, Country, `Age at screening (Y:M)`, `Reason for Screen Failure` = IECAT, `Abbreviated Description` = Description)
```

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

kable(sf, 
      align = rep("c", ncol(sf))) |>
  row_spec(0,bold=TRUE) |>
  kable_styling(font_size = 9, latex_options = "striped") |> 
  column_spec(5, width = "6cm")
```

### Participant Status in Study

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

ds <- scr |> 
  filter(!is.na(Current)) |> 
  arrange(COHORT, Subject) |> 
  select(Cohort = COHORT, `Participant ID` = Subject, Site, `Current Status` = Current) 
```

```{r }
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

kable(ds) |>
  row_spec(0,bold=TRUE) |>
  kable_styling(font_size = 9, latex_options = "striped") |> 
  footnote(general = "Study Milestones: Core Study, Open-label Extension, Long Term Extension")
```

\newpage

## Baseline Characteristics

### Demographics of All Enrolled Participants

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

height <- vs |> 
  select(Subject, HEIGHT, VSDAT, TRTSDT) |> 
  filter(!is.na(HEIGHT) & !is.na(VSDAT) & VSDAT <= TRTSDT) |>
  arrange(Subject, desc(VSDAT)) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(Subject, HEIGHT)


weight <- vs |> 
  select(Subject, WEIGHT, VSDAT, TRTSDT) |> 
  filter(!is.na(WEIGHT) & !is.na(VSDAT) & VSDAT <= TRTSDT) |>
  arrange(Subject, desc(VSDAT)) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(Subject, WEIGHT)

bmi <- vs |> 
  select(Subject, BMI, VSDAT, TRTSDT) |> 
  filter(!is.na(BMI) & !is.na(VSDAT) & VSDAT <= TRTSDT) |>
  arrange(Subject, desc(VSDAT)) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |> 
  slice(1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(Subject, BMI) |> 
  mutate(BMI = round_half_up(BMI, 1))
  
demog <- scr |>
  filter(!is.na(TRTSDT))  |> 
  mutate(
    # Count number of race flags selected (excluding RAW and RACEOTH)
    race_flags = rowSums(across(starts_with("RACE") & 
                                  !ends_with("_RAW") & 
                                  !matches("RACEOTH")), na.rm = TRUE),
    
    # Create final RACE variable based on flags and RACEOTH
    RACE = case_when(
      race_flags > 1 ~ "Multiple",
      RACE1 == 1 ~ "American Indian or Alaska Native",
      RACE2 == 1 ~ "Asian",
      RACE3 == 1 ~ "Black or African American",
      RACE4 == 1 ~ "Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander",
      RACE5 == 1 ~ "White",
      RACE6 == 1 ~ "Not Reported",
      RACE7 == 1 ~ "Unknown",
      !is.na(RACEOTH) & RACEOTH != "" ~ "Other",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )  |> 
  select(-race_flags) |> 
  mutate(SEX = ifelse(!is.na(SEX), SEX, "Unknown"),
         SEX = factor(SEX, levels = c("Female", "Male", "Unknown")),
         RACE = factor(RACE, levels = c("American Indian or Alaska Native", 
                                            "Asian", 
                                            "Black or African American", 
                                            "Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander", 
                                            "White",
                                            "Unknown")),
         ETHNIC = factor(ETHNIC, levels = c("Hispanic or Latino",
                                            "Not Hispanic or Latino",
                                            "Not Reported",
                                            "Unknown"))
         ) |> 
  left_join(height) |> 
  left_join(weight) |> 
  left_join(bmi) |> 
  select(Subject, COHORT, AGEM, SEX, ETHNIC, RACE, HEIGHT, WEIGHT, BMI)

demog <- demog |>
  mutate(
    COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = c("Cohort A1", "Cohort A2", "Cohort A3", "Cohort B1"))
  )

vars <- c(
    AGEM = "Age (months)", 
    SEX = "Sex (n, %)",
    RACE = "Race (n, %)",
    ETHNIC = "Ethnicity (n, %)",
    HEIGHT = "Height (cm)",
    WEIGHT = "Weight (kg)",
    BMI = paste0("BMI (kg/m", "\u00B2", ")")
  )

demogtab <- 
  basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
  split_cols_by(var = "COHORT") |>
  add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
  analyze_vars(
    vars = names(vars),
    var_labels = vars, 
    na_str = ""
  ) |>
  build_table(demog) |> 
  trim_rows()


demogtab %>%
  tt_to_df1()  %>%  
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
        )
```

\newpage

### Disease Baseline Characteristics of All Treated Participants (Study Specific Assessments)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

# S298P+, S298P-
pheno <- geno |> 
  select(Subject = SUBJID, AACID, LBDAT) |> 
  group_by(Subject, LBDAT) |> 
  summarise(VAL = paste(AACID, collapse = "|"), .groups = "drop") |> 
  mutate(VAL = ifelse(grepl("ser298pro", VAL, ignore.case = TRUE), "S298P+", "S298P-"),
         TEST = "Mutation (S298P+/S298P-)",
         DAT = as.Date(LBDAT, format = "%d-%b-%Y"),
         VISIT = "Baseline"
         ) |> 
  select(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST, VAL)

# Hearing Aide
hear <- abr |> 
  mutate(DAT = as.Date(ABRDAT),
         VISIT = FolderName,
         VAL = ABRAIDYN,
         TEST = "Hearing Aid Use") |> 
  distinct(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST, VAL) |> 
  filter(VISIT %in% "Baseline")

# ADA Status
ada_stat <- ada |> 
  select(Subject = SUBJID, VISIT, DAT = LBDAT, VAL = LBORRESC) |> 
  mutate(DAT = as.Date(DAT),
         TEST = "ADA Screen Result") |> 
  filter(!grepl("Unscheduled", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE))

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # CSF HS processing block removed

# URHS
urhs_vals <- urhs |> 
  mutate(LBLLOQ = as.numeric(LBLLOQ),
         LBORRES1 = ifelse(is.character(urhs$LBORRES) & LBORRES == "BQL",
                          as.character(0.5*LBLLOQ),
                          LBORRES),
         LBORRES = as.numeric(LBORRES1),
         DAT = as.Date(LBDAT),
         TEST = paste0("Urine ", LBTEST, " (", LBORRESU, ")"),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT)) |> 
  rename(Subject = SUBJID) |> 
  group_by(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST) |> 
  summarise(VAL = sum(LBORRES)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  left_join(urcrea |> 
              select(Subject = SUBJID, VISIT, CREAT = LBORRES) |> 
              mutate(VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT))) |> 
  mutate(VAL = VAL/CREAT, 
         TEST = str_replace(TEST, "ng/mL", "ng/ug Creatinine")) |> 
  select(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST, VAL)

# Abdominal Volume
vol_vals <- vol |> 
  left_join(scr |> select(SUBJID = Subject, BRTHDT)) |>
  mutate(Subject = SUBJID, 
         TEST = MOTEST,
         MOORRES = as.numeric(MOORRES),
         DAT = as.Date(MODTC, format = "%d-%b-%Y"),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT),
         AGEASS = (DAT - BRTHDT +1)/30.4375) |> 
  left_join(height) |> 
  left_join(weight) |> 
  mutate(
    expvol = case_when(TEST == "Liver Volume" & AGEASS <= 12 ~ -143.06 + 4.27*HEIGHT + 14.79*WEIGHT,
                       TEST == "Liver Volume" & !(AGEASS <= 12) ~ -20.25 + (3.34 * HEIGHT) + (13.11 * WEIGHT),
                       TEST == "Spleen Volume" ~ 0.7 + (4.6 * WEIGHT),
                       TRUE ~ NA_real_),
    vub = MOORRES/expvol,
    VAL = round_half_up(vub, digits = 2),
    TEST = paste0(TEST, " MN")
  ) |> 
  select(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST, VAL) |> 
  mutate(VISIT =ifelse(grepl("Baseline", VISIT), "Baseline", VISIT))

# Brain MRI
brn_vals <- brn |> 
   mutate(Subject = SUBJID, 
         TEST = paste0(NVLAT, "-", NVLOC, "-", NVTEST),
         TEST = ifelse(!is.na(NVUNIT), paste0(TEST, " (", NVUNIT, ")"), TEST),
         VAL = as.numeric(NVRESULT),
         DAT = as.Date(NVDAT, format = "%Y-%m-%d"),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT)) |> 
  distinct(Subject, VISIT, DAT, TEST, VAL)

# ABR
abrlab <- get_label(abr) |> 
  as.data.frame() |> 
  rownames_to_column(var = "TESTCD")

names(abrlab) <- c("TESTCD", "TEST")


abr_vals <- abr |> 
  select(Subject, VISIT = FolderName, DAT = ABRDAT, ABREAR,
         ABRR2, ABRR3, ABRR4, ABRR5, ABRR14, ABRR15, ABRR16, ABRR17,
         ABRR6, ABRR18, ABRR7, ABRR19, ABRR8, ABRR20, ABRR9, ABRR21,
         ABRSP, ABRAIDYN, ABRAIDL, ABRAIDR
         ) |> 
  mutate(across(c(ABRR2, ABRR3, ABRR4, ABRR5, ABRR14, ABRR15, 
                        ABRR16, ABRR17, ABRR6, ABRR18, ABRR7, ABRR19, 
                        ABRR8, ABRR20, ABRR9, ABRR21, ABRSP, ABRAIDYN, 
                        ABRAIDL, ABRAIDR),
                as.numeric)) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(ABRR2, ABRR3, ABRR4, ABRR5, ABRR14, ABRR15, 
                        ABRR16, ABRR17, ABRR6, ABRR18, ABRR7, ABRR19, 
                        ABRR8, ABRR20, ABRR9, ABRR21, ABRSP, ABRAIDYN, 
                        ABRAIDL, ABRAIDR),
               names_to = "TESTCD", 
               values_to = "VAL") |> 
  filter(!is.na(VAL)) |> 
  left_join(abrlab) |> 
  mutate(TEST = trimws(paste0(TEST, " (", ABREAR, ")")),
         DAT = as.Date(DAT)) |> 
  select(-ABREAR, -TESTCD)
  

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # QS/COA processing block removed
# (CSF HS, KABC, VABS-III, BSID III/IV scores not included in safety report)

# Combine all values (safety-only: urhs, vol, brn, abr only)
testvals_cont <- bind_rows(
  urhs_vals,
  vol_vals,
  brn_vals,
  abr_vals
) |> 
  mutate(VAL = round_half_up(VAL, 1)) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character), trimws)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT)) |> 
  left_join(ex |> distinct(Subject, InstanceName, EXSTDAT),
            by = c("Subject", "DAT" = "EXSTDAT")) |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |>
  mutate(UNSC = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), "Y", NA_character_),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), InstanceName, VISIT),
         DT = DAT) |> 
  derive_vars_dy(TRTSDT, exprs(DT)) |> 
  mutate(VISIT1 = paste0("Week ", ceiling(DY/7)),
         VISIT =  ifelse(is.na(VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT)) |>
  select(-InstanceName, -VISIT1)
  
testvals_cont_base <- testvals_cont |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |> 
  filter(DAT <= TRTSDT) |> 
  arrange(TEST, Subject, TRTSDT, DAT) |> 
  group_by(TEST, Subject) |> 
  slice_tail() |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(COHORT, Subject, TEST, VAL) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = TEST, values_from = VAL) |> 
  rename(Cohort = COHORT)

testvals_cat <- bind_rows(
  pheno, 
  hear, 
  ada_stat
  ) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  mutate(across(where(is.character), trimws)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT))

testvals_cat_base <- testvals_cat |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |> 
  filter(DAT <= TRTSDT) |> 
  arrange(TEST, Subject, TRTSDT, DAT) |> 
  group_by(TEST, Subject) |> 
  slice_tail() |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  select(COHORT, Subject, TEST, VAL) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = TEST, values_from = VAL) |> 
  rename(Cohort = COHORT)

testvals_base <- testvals_cont_base |> 
  left_join(testvals_cat_base) |> 
  mutate(USUBJID = Subject)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

testvals_base <- testvals_base |> 
  mutate(Cohort = factor(Cohort, levels = cohfact),
         "Mutation (S298P+/S298P-)" = as.factor(`Mutation (S298P+/S298P-)`),
         "Hearing Aid Use" = as.factor(`Hearing Aid Use`),
         "ADA Screen Result" = as.factor(`ADA Screen Result`)
         )

vars <- c(
  "Mutation (S298P+/S298P-)",
  "Hearing Aid Use",
  "ADA Screen Result",
  # EXCLUDED - efficacy # "CSF Heparan Sulfate (ng/mL)", "CSF Dermatan Sulfate (ng/mL)",
  "Urine Heparan Sulfate (ng/ug Creatinine)", "Urine Dermatan Sulfate (ng/ug Creatinine)",
  "Liver Volume MN", "Spleen Volume MN"
  # EXCLUDED - efficacy # Vineland 3, BSID III/IV, KABC removed
)

tbl <- basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
  split_cols_by(var = "Cohort") |>
  add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
  analyze_vars(
    vars = vars,
    var_labels = vars,
    na_str = ""
  ) |>
  build_table(testvals_base)

tbl %>%
  tt_to_df1()  %>%  
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), "0", as.character(.)))) %>%
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
        )
```

\newpage

## Study Conduct

### Completion of Scheduled Dosing

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

allvis <- dov |> 
  filter(!grepl("Unscheduled", FolderName) & Subject %in% safflds$Subject) |> 
  distinct(Subject, FolderName, VISYN, VIRSN) |>
  rename(VISIT = FolderName) |> 
  mutate(VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         VISITNUM = case_when(VISIT == "Screening" ~ -1,
                            VISIT == "Baseline" ~ 0,
                            TRUE ~ VISITNUM))

exvis <- ex |> 
  mutate(EXSTTIM = str_pad(EXSTTIM, width = 5, side = "left", pad = "0"),
         EXSTTIM = ifelse(!is.na(EXSTTIM), paste0(EXSTTIM, ":00"), NA_character_),
         EXSTDTC = paste0(EXSTDAT, "T", EXSTTIM),
         EXENDTC = paste0(EXENDAT, "T", EXENTIM),
         EXSTDT = as.Date(EXSTDTC, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M"),
         EXENDT = as.Date(EXENDTC, format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M")) |>  
  arrange(Subject, EXSTDTC, EXENDTC) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |> 
  mutate(
    TRTSDT = ifelse(row_number() == 1, EXSTDT, NA),
    TRTEDT = ifelse(row_number() == n(), EXENDT, NA),
    TRTSDT = as.Date(TRTSDT),
    TRTEDT = as.Date(TRTEDT)
    ) |> 
  fill(TRTSDT, .direction = "down") |> 
  fill(TRTEDT, .direction = "up") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  derive_vars_duration(new_var = TRTDUR, new_var_unit = TRTDURU, start_date = TRTSDT, end_date = TRTEDT, in_unit = "d", out_unit = "w") |> 
  distinct(Subject, FolderName, EXSTDT, EXSTDTC, EXDOSE, TRTDUR) |> 
  rename(VISIT = FolderName) |> 
  mutate(VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         VISITNUM = case_when(VISIT == "Screening" ~ -1,
                            VISIT == "Baseline" ~ 0,
                            TRUE ~ VISITNUM))

exvis <- allvis |> 
  filter(!VISIT %in% c("Baseline", "Screening", "ITI Baseline", "ITI Screening")) |> 
  left_join(exvis) |> 
  arrange(Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT) |> 
  mutate(EXDOSE1 = EXDOSE) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |> 
  mutate(lagvis = lag(VISITNUM)) |> 
  fill(EXDOSE1, .direction = "down") |> 
  fill(TRTDUR, .direction = "down") |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(EXDOSE1 = paste(EXDOSE1, "mg/kg"),
         EXDOSE1 = ifelse(is.na(VIRSN) | VIRSN %in% "Not required by protocol", 
                          EXDOSE1,
                          paste0("Skipped (", VIRSN, ")")),
         EXDOSE1 = ifelse(grepl("EOS", VISIT), "Discontinued", EXDOSE1),
         VISITNUM = ifelse(is.na(VISITNUM) & !is.na(lagvis), lagvis + 1, VISITNUM)
         ) |> 
  select(-lagvis) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  arrange(COHORT, desc(TRTDUR), Subject, VISITNUM) |> 
  mutate(
    COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact),
    EXDOSE1 = factor(EXDOSE1, levels = c("3 mg/kg", "6 mg/kg", "10 mg/kg", 
                                         "Skipped (Adverse Event)", "Skipped (Other)",
                                         "Discontinued"))
         ) |> 
  group_by(COHORT) |>
  mutate(Subject = fct_reorder(Subject, -desc(TRTDUR))) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

excomp <- 
exvis |>
  ggplot(aes(y=Subject, group = Subject)) +
  geom_line(aes(x= VISITNUM, col = EXDOSE1), size = 5) +
  geom_point(aes(x = VISITNUM, color = EXDOSE1), shape = 15, size = 5) +
  facet_wrap(~ COHORT, ncol = 1, strip.position = "left", scales = "free_y")+
  theme_bw() +
  scale_color_manual(
    name = "Dosed/Skipped/Discontinued",
    breaks = c(
      "3 mg/kg" ,  
      "6 mg/kg" ,  
      "10 mg/kg",
      "Skipped (Adverse Event)",
      "Skipped (Other)",
      "Discontinued"
    ),
    values = c(
      "3 mg/kg" = "#1f78b4",  
      "6 mg/kg" = "#b28ccf",  
      "10 mg/kg" = "#33a02c",
      "Skipped (Adverse Event)" = "darkgray",
      "Skipped (Other)"     = "black",
      "Discontinued" = "red"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 13, 25, 49, 97),
    limits = c(1, 97),
    labels = c("Week 1", "Week 13", "Week 25", "Week 49", "Week 97")
  ) +
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.placement = "outside",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),
    
    legend.position = c(.95, 0),   # (x, y) in normalized plot coordinates
    legend.justification = c("right", "bottom"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "black")
    ) +
  labs(x = "Visit")

excomp
```

\newpage

### Availability of Planned Key Assessments (Data available at the time of extraction)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

comp <- function(df, title, params){
  soa_df <- soa |> 
    filter(TITLE %in% title) |> 
    distinct(COHORT, VISIT, VISITNUM) |> 
    inner_join(safflds) |> 
    mutate(SOA = "Y")
  
  catvis_unsc <- df |> 
    filter(TEST %in% params & !is.na(UNSC)) |>
    distinct(COHORT, Subject, VISIT, UNSC)
  
  catvis <- df |> # Getting the PARAM data
    filter(TEST %in% params) |>
    distinct(COHORT, VISIT, Subject) |> 
    mutate(ASSESSED = "Assessed",
           VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
           VISITNUM = case_when(VISIT == "Screening" ~ -1,
                                VISIT == "Baseline" ~ 0,
                                TRUE ~ VISITNUM)) |> 
    arrange(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM) |> 
    left_join(catvis_unsc, by = c("COHORT", "Subject", "VISIT")) |> 
    mutate(ASSESSED = ifelse(!is.na(UNSC), "Unscheduled", ASSESSED)) |> 
    select(-UNSC)
  
  exvis_max <- exvis |> 
    filter(VISYN == "Yes") |> 
    distinct(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT) |> 
    group_by(COHORT, Subject) |>
    summarise(maxvis = max(VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  soa_df <- soa_df |> 
    left_join(exvis_max, by = c("COHORT", "Subject")) |>
    filter(VISITNUM <= maxvis) |> 
    distinct(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT) 
  
  
  catvis <- catvis |> 
      full_join(soa_df, by = c("COHORT", "Subject", "VISITNUM", "VISIT")) |> 
      arrange(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT) |> 
      mutate(ASSESSED = ifelse(is.na(ASSESSED), "Not Available", ASSESSED))
  
  if(title %in% c("BSID III")){
    catvis <- catvis |>
      mutate(ASSESSED = ifelse(COHORT %in% "Cohort A1" & VISIT %in% c("Baseline", "Week 25"),
                               "Exclude", ASSESSED))
  }
  
  
  if(title %in% "BSID IV"){
  catvis_b4 <- df |> # Getting the PARAM data
    filter(TEST %in% c("BSID III Cognitive Raw Score",
                       "BSID III Expressive Communication Raw Score",
                       "BSID III Receptive Communication Raw Score",
                       "BSID III Gross Motor Raw Score",
                       "BSID III Fine Motor Raw Score")) |>
    distinct(COHORT, VISIT, Subject) |> 
    mutate(ASSESSED = "Assessed",
           VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 49", VISIT), "Week 49", VISIT),
           VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
           VISITNUM = case_when(VISIT == "Screening" ~ -1,
                                VISIT == "Baseline" ~ 0,
                                TRUE ~ VISITNUM)) |> 
    arrange(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM) |> 
    distinct(COHORT, Subject)
  
  catvis<- catvis |> 
    full_join(catvis_b4, by = c("COHORT", "Subject"))
  
  all_lvls <- if (is.factor(catvis$COHORT)) levels(catvis$COHORT) else unique(catvis$COHORT)
  
}
  
  
  catvis |>
    ggplot(aes(y=Subject, group = Subject)) +
    geom_point(aes(x= VISITNUM, col = ASSESSED), size = 5) +
    facet_wrap(~ COHORT, ncol = 1, strip.position = "left", scales = "free_y")+
    theme_bw() +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "",
      values = c(
        "Assessed" = "blue", 
        "Not Available" = "gray",   
        "Unscheduled" = "cyan", 
        "Exclude" = "transparent"
      ),
      breaks = c("Not Available", "Unscheduled")
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = catvis |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> arrange(VISITNUM) |> pull(VISITNUM) |> append(97),
      labels = catvis |> distinct(VISIT, VISITNUM) |> arrange(VISITNUM) |> pull(VISIT) |> append("Week 97"),
      limits = c(min(catvis$VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE), 97)
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_blank(),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),
      
      legend.position = c(.95, 0),   # (x, y) in normalized plot coordinates
      legend.justification = c("right", "bottom"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA), 
      
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), 
    ) +
    labs(title = title,
         x = "Visit Name")
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # csf <-
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # comp(
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   df = testvals_cont,
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   title = "CSF (Biomarkers)",
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   params = c("CSF Heparan Sulfate (ng/mL)",
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #              "CSF Dermatan Sulfate (ng/mL)")
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # )

urn <-
comp(
  df = testvals_cont,
  title = "Urine (Biomarkers)",
  params = c("Urine Heparan Sulfate (ng/ug Creatinine)",
             "Urine Dermatan Sulfate (ng/ug Creatinine)")
)

org <-
comp(
  df = testvals_cont,
  title = "Abdominal MRI (Liver and Spleen)",
  params = c("Liver Volume MN",
             "Spleen Volume MN")
  )

brnc <-
comp(
  df = testvals_cont,
  title = "Brain MRI",
  params = distinct(brn_vals, TEST) |> pull(TEST)
  )

abrc <-
comp(
  df = testvals_cont,
  title = "Auditory Brainstem Response",
  params = distinct(abr_vals, TEST) |> pull(TEST)
  )

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # kabc, vin, b3, b4 comp calls removed (Clinical Outcomes)
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # kabc <- comp(df = testvals_cont |> filter(!is.na(VAL)),
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   title = "Kaufman Assessment Battery for Children",
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   params = distinct(kabc_vals, TEST) |> pull(TEST))
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # vin <- comp(df = testvals_cont |> filter(!is.na(VAL)),
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   title = "Vineland 3", params = c("Vineland 3 ABRS8", "Vineland 3 ABC"))
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # b3 <- comp(df = testvals_cont |> filter(!is.na(VAL)),
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   title = "BSID III", params = c(...))
# EXCLUDED - efficacy # b4 <- comp(df = testvals_cont |> filter(!is.na(VAL)),
# EXCLUDED - efficacy #   title = "BSID IV", params = c(...))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

foot <- paste("Biomarker samples analyzed at a specialty laboratory.",
              "Blue markers indicate scheduled assessments populated in the dataset.", 
              "Gray markers indicate assessments scheduled but not populated in the dataset.",
              "Study week for unscheduled assessments was determined by dividing study day by 7.",
              sep = "\n")

# EXCLUDED - efficacy # CSF plot removed; showing Urine only
urn +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = foot,
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

foot <- paste("Blue markers indicate scheduled assessments populated in the dataset.", 
              "Gray markers indicate assessments scheduled but not populated in the dataset.",
              "Study week for unscheduled assessments was determined by dividing study day by 7.",
              sep = "\n")

(org + brnc) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = foot,
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 8

foot <- paste("Blue markers indicate scheduled assessments populated in the dataset.", 
              "Gray markers indicate assessments scheduled but not populated in the dataset.",
              "Study week for unscheduled assessments was determined by dividing study day by 7.",
              sep = "\n")

abrc +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = foot,
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

<!-- EXCLUDED - efficacy: KABC+Vineland and BSID III+IV completion plots removed -->

\newpage

### Important Protocol Deviation Summary

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

dv <- dv |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT))

pd <- dv |> 
  left_join(scr |> distinct(Subject, AGE, AGEM, SEX, COHORT)) |> 
  left_join(demog |> distinct(Subject, RACE)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT) & 
           `Deviation Category` %in% "Protocol Deviation" & 
           Important %in% "Yes") |> 
  mutate(
    `Participant ID/Cohort` = paste0(Subject, "/", COHORT),
    `Age(Y:M)/Sex/Race` = paste0(str_c(AGE, ":", AGEM-(AGE*12)), "/", SEX, "/", RACE),
    `Date of Deviation` = `Date Occurred`,
    `Important Protocol Deviation` = Description
    ) |> 
  select(`Participant ID/Cohort`,  `Age(Y:M)/Sex/Race`, `Date of Deviation`, `Important Protocol Deviation`) 

impd <- dv |> 
  filter(`Deviation Category` %in% "Protocol Deviation" & Important %in% "Yes") |> 
  mutate(CAT = "Participant with atleast one important protocol deviation") |> 
  distinct(CAT, COHORT, Subject, USUBJID, Description) |> 
  mutate(
    SUBCAT = case_when(
      str_detect(Description, regex("AESI|SAE|adverse event", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Adverse event reporting deviation",
      str_detect(Description, regex("informed consent", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Informed consent violation",
      str_detect(Description, regex("not performed|missed visit|missed assessment", ignore_case = TRUE)) &
        str_detect(Description, regex("safety", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Missed assessment – safety",
      str_detect(Description, regex("not performed|missed visit|missed assessment", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Missed visit",
      str_detect(Description, regex("out of window", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Out of window",
      str_detect(Description, regex("treatment supplies|trtmt supplies|drug accountability", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Study treatment not administered per protocol",
      str_detect(Description, regex("restriction|excluded therapy|ineligible|violation of inclusion", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Protocol exclusion or restriction violated",
      TRUE ~ "Other deviation"
    )
  ) |> 
  distinct(COHORT, Subject, USUBJID, CAT, SUBCAT) |> 
  mutate(COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact))
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
pdtab <-
pd |> 
  kable() |> 
  row_spec(0,bold=TRUE) |> 
  column_spec(4, latex_column_spec = "p{5cm}") |> 
  kable_styling(font_size = 9, latex_options = "striped") |> 
  kable_styling(latex_options = "hold_position")


pdsumtab <-
basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) %>% 
  split_cols_by("COHORT") %>%
  add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") %>% 
  summarize_num_patients(
    var = "USUBJID",
    .stats = "unique",
    .labels = "Participant with atleast one important protocol deviation"
  ) %>% 
  count_occurrences(
    vars = "SUBCAT"
  ) %>%
  append_topleft("Important Protocol Deviation Type") %>% 
  build_table(impd, alt_counts_df = safflds) %>% 
  tt_to_df1() %>%
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE, 
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.), 
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.)))
        )
```

\vspace{0.5cm}

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

pdsumtab

pdtab 
```

\newpage

## Study Drug Exposure

### Study Drug Exposure by Cohort

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

ae <- ae  |>
  mutate(
    AETOXGR = as.character(AETOXGR) |> trimws(),
    AESTDAT = date(AESTDAT),
    AEENDAT = date(AEENDAT),
    AESTDAT_INT = as.Date(AESTDAT_INT),
    AEACNAE = paste0(ifelse(AEACNCM == 1, "Concom-Medication", ""),
                     " ",
                     ifelse(AEACNPRO == 1, "Procedure", "")) |> trimws(),
    SAECRIT = pmap_chr(
      list(
        ifelse(AESDTH == 1, "Fatal", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESLIFE == 1, "Life-threatening", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESDISAB == 1, "Disability", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESHOSP == 1, "Required inpatient hospitalization", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESHOSPS == 1, "Prolongation of existing hospitalization", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESCONG == 1, "Congenital anomaly", NA_character_),
        ifelse(AESMIE == 1, "Significant medical event", NA_character_)
      ),
      ~ str_c(na.omit(c(...)), collapse = ", ")
    ),
    IRRFL = ifelse(AETERM_PT == "Infusion related reaction", "Yes", "No")
  ) |>
  left_join(scr |> select(Subject, COHORT)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT))

allae <- ae |> # Treatment emergent 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |> 
  mutate(
    USUBJID = Subject,
    ASTDT = case_when(is.na(AESTDAT) & 
                          !is.na(AESTDAT_INT) & 
                          substr(AESTDAT_INT, 1, 7) == substr(as.character(TRTSDT), 1, 7) ~ TRTSDT,
                        is.na(AESTDAT) &
                          !is.na(AESTDAT_INT) &
                          as.Date(AESTDAT_INT) >= TRTSDT ~ AESTDAT_INT,
                        is.na(AESTDAT) &
                          !is.na(AESTDAT_INT) &
                          as.Date(AESTDAT_INT) < TRTSDT ~ ceiling_date(ym(substr(AESTDAT_INT, 1, 7)),
                                                                       "month") - days(1),
                        TRUE ~ AESTDAT),
    ASTDT = as.Date(ASTDT),
    ASTDTM = as.POSIXct(paste0(ASTDT, "T", AESTTIM), format = "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M"),
    AENDT = as.Date(AEENDAT),
    AETOXGRN = parse_number(AETOXGR),
    TRTEMFL = case_when(!is.na(ASTDTM) & ASTDTM >= TRTSDTM ~ "Y",
                             is.na(ASTDTM) & ASTDT >= TRTSDT ~ "Y",
                             is.na(ASTDT) & 
                               !is.na(AESTDAT_INT) & 
                               substr(AESTDAT_INT, 1, 7) == substr(as.character(TRTSDT), 1, 7) ~ "Y",
                             is.na(AESTDAT) & 
                               !is.na(AESTDAT_INT) & 
                               as.Date(AESTDAT_INT) >= TRTSDT ~ "Y",
                             TRUE ~ NA_character_), 
    AETERM_PT = ifelse(is.na(AETERM_PT), AETERM, AETERM_PT),
    AETERM_SOC = ifelse(is.na(AETERM_SOC), "Uncoded", AETERM_SOC),
    AEACN = ifelse(is.na(AEACN), "Unknown", AEACN),
    ASTDY = ifelse(ASTDT >= TRTSDT,
                   as.integer(ASTDT - TRTSDT + 1),
                   as.integer(ASTDT - TRTSDT)),
    AENDY = ifelse(AENDT >= TRTSDT,
                   as.integer(AENDT - TRTSDT + 1),
                   as.integer(AENDT - TRTSDT)),
    across(all_of(c("AESI2", "AESI3", "AESI4")), ~ ifelse(. == 1, "Yes", "No")),
    AETOXGR = factor(
      AETOXGR,
      levels = c("1","2","3","4","5"),
      labels = c("Grade 1","Grade 2","Grade 3","Grade 4","Grade 5"),
      ordered = TRUE
      ),
    AETERM_SOC = toupper(AETERM_SOC)
  ) |> 
  select(COHORT, USUBJID, Subject, AESTDAT, AEENDAT, ASTDT, ASTDTM, ASTDY, AENDT, AENDY, TRTSDT, 
         AETERM, AEDECOD = AETERM_PT, AESOC = AETERM_SOC, AEBODSYS = AETERM_SOC, AESI2, AESI3, AESI4,
         AESER, SAECRIT, AEOUT, AESEV, AEREL, AEACN, AEACNAE, AESI, AETOXGR, AETOXGRN, PROCREL, TRTEMFL, AESPID,
         IRRFL, AESDTH) |> 
  distinct() |> 
  arrange(Subject, ASTDT) |> 
  left_join(demog |> select(Subject, AGEM, SEX), by = "Subject")

allae <- allae |> 
  mutate(
    `Participant ID, Cohort, Age(months)/Sex` = 
      paste0(
        Subject, ", ",
        COHORT, ", ",
        AGEM, "/", SEX
      ),
    AEID = AESPID,
    `SYSTEM ORGAN CLASS, Preferred Term, Term` =
      paste(AESOC, ", ", 
            AEDECOD, ", ", 
            AETERM),
    `S: Start Date(Day), E: End Date(Day)` =
      paste0("S: ", ASTDT, " (", ASTDY, "), E: ", ifelse(is.na(AENDT), " --", paste0(AENDT, " (", AENDY, ")"))), 
    `CTCAE Grading, Seriousness` =
      paste0(AETOXGR, ", ", AESER),
    `Action Taken D: DNL126, A: AE` =
      paste0("D: ", AEACN, ", A:", ifelse(is.na(AEACNAE)|AEACNAE == "", " --", AEACNAE)),
    Outcome = AEOUT,
    `Relationship D: DNL126, P: Protocol Procedure` =
      paste0("D: ", AEREL, ", P: ", ifelse(is.na(PROCREL)|PROCREL == "", " --", PROCREL))
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

dovmiss <- dov |> 
  filter(VISYN == "No" & 
           !grepl("Screening|Baseline|Unscheduled", InstanceName) &
           !grepl("Not required by protocol", VIRSN)
  ) |> 
  distinct(Subject, VISIT = trimws(InstanceName)) |> 
  mutate(SOURCE = "DOV",
         MISSFL = "Y",
         EXVOLA = 0,
         EXVOLP = 0) |> 
  arrange(Subject, VISIT)

adex <- ex |> 
  mutate(EXSTTIM = ifelse(nchar(EXSTTIM) == 4, paste0("0", EXSTTIM), EXSTTIM), # Standardizing time as HH:MM
         EXENTIM = ifelse(nchar(EXENTIM) == 4, paste0("0", EXENTIM), EXENTIM)) |> 
  transmute(Subject,
            VISIT = trimws(InstanceName), 
            VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", VISIT), "Week 25", VISIT),
            EXSTDAT,
            EXSTTIM,
            EXSTDTC = paste0(EXSTDAT, "T", EXSTTIM),
            EXSTDT = convert_dtc_to_dt(EXSTDTC),
            EXSTDTM = convert_dtc_to_dtm(EXSTDTC),
            EXENDAT,
            EXENTIM,
            EXENDTC = paste0(EXENDAT, "T", EXENTIM),
            EXENDT = convert_dtc_to_dt(EXENDTC),
            EXENDTM = convert_dtc_to_dtm(EXENDTC),
            INTRSTTM,
            INTRSTDTC = if_else(EXITRPYN == "Yes" & !is.na(INTRSTTM),
                                paste0(EXSTDAT, "T", INTRSTTM),
                                NA),
            INTRSTDT = convert_dtc_to_dt(INTRSTDTC),
            INTRSTDTM = convert_dtc_to_dtm(INTRSTDTC),
            INTRENTM,
            INTRENDTC = if_else(EXITRPYN == "Yes" & !is.na(INTRENTM),
                                paste0(EXSTDAT, "T", INTRENTM), 
                                NA),
            INTRENDT = convert_dtc_to_dt(INTRENDTC),
            INTRENDTM = convert_dtc_to_dtm(INTRENDTC),
            EXOCCUR,
            EXITRPYN, # was it interrupted?
            INTRSN, # why was it interrupted?
            INFRSTYN, # was the infusion restarted?
            EXRSND, # reason dose wasn't done
            EXPLTDOS, # expected dose
            EXACTDOS, # actual dose
            EXVOLA, # actual volume
            EXVOLP, # planned volume
            DOSE = paste(EXDOSE, "mg/kg"),
            EXINRATE = as.numeric(EXINRATE),
            
            # COMPLIANCE = EXVOLA / EXVOLP * 100,
            
            deviation = if_else(!is.na(EXVOLA) & !is.na(EXVOLP),
                                abs((EXVOLA - EXVOLP) / EXVOLP) * 100,
                                NA_real_),
            PLANDOSE = as.numeric(EXPLTDOS),
            ACTDOSE = case_when(
              is.na(EXVOLA) & is.na(EXACTDOS) ~ NA_real_,
              !is.na(EXVOLA) & !is.na(EXVOLP) & EXVOLA > EXVOLP ~ PLANDOSE,
              !is.na(EXVOLA) & !is.na(EXVOLP) & EXVOLA < EXVOLP & deviation < 10 ~ PLANDOSE,
              !is.na(EXVOLA) & !is.na(EXVOLP) & EXVOLA < EXVOLP & deviation >= 10 ~ (PLANDOSE * as.numeric(EXVOLA)) / EXVOLP,
              deviation == 0 ~ PLANDOSE,
              TRUE ~ NA_real_),
            COMPLIANCE = ((ACTDOSE / PLANDOSE) * 100),
            
            SOURCE
  ) |>
  arrange(Subject, EXSTDTC) |>
  group_by(Subject) |>
  mutate(TRTSDT = min(EXSTDAT[EXOCCUR == "Yes"])) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  bind_rows(dovmiss) |> 
  mutate(
    COMPCAT = case_when(
              COMPLIANCE < 50 ~ "<50%",
              COMPLIANCE >= 50 & COMPLIANCE < 75 ~ "50-<75%",
              COMPLIANCE >= 75 & COMPLIANCE < 90 ~ "75-<90%",
              COMPLIANCE >= 90 & COMPLIANCE <= 100 ~ "90-100%",
              COMPLIANCE > 100 ~ ">100%",
              EXVOLA == 0 | is.na(EXVOLA)  ~ "Missing Dose Entry",
              .default = "other"
              ),
    COMPCAT = factor(
              COMPCAT,
              levels = c(
              "<50%",
              "50-<75%",
              "75-<90%",
              "90-100%",
              ">100%",
              "Missing Dose Entry"
              )
              )
    ) |> 
  derive_vars_dy(TRTSDT, exprs(EXSTDT, EXENDT)) |> 
  group_by(Subject) |>
  mutate(AVISIT = VISIT,
         AVISITN = parse_number(AVISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         TRTDURW = difftime(max(EXENDT[grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR)]), 
                            min(EXSTDT[grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR)]), 
                            units = "weeks") |> as.numeric(),
         DOS13MISS = ifelse(AVISITN <= 13 & is.na(EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_),
         DOS25MISS = ifelse(AVISITN <= 25 & is.na(EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_),
         DOS49MISS = ifelse(AVISITN <= 49 & is.na(EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_),
         DOS97MISS = ifelse(AVISITN <= 97 & is.na(EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)
  )

dos13 <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS13 = ifelse(AVISITN <= 13 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS13 == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS13)

dos25 <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS25 = ifelse(AVISITN <= 25 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS25 == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS25)

dos49 <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS49 = ifelse(AVISITN <= 49 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS49 == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS49)

dos97 <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS97 = ifelse(AVISITN <= 97 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS97 == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS97)

dos13c <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS13COMP = ifelse(AVISITN >= 13 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS13COMP == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS13COMP)

dos25c <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS25COMP = ifelse(AVISITN >= 25 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS25COMP == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS25COMP)

dos49c <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS49COMP = ifelse(AVISITN >= 49 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS49COMP == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS49COMP)

dos97c <- adex |> 
  mutate(DOS97COMP = ifelse(AVISITN >= 97 & grepl("Yes", EXOCCUR), "Y", NA_character_)) |> 
  filter(DOS97COMP == "Y") |> 
  distinct(Subject, DOS97COMP)

adex <- list(adex, dos13, dos25, dos49, dos97, dos13c, dos25c, dos49c, dos97c) |> 
  reduce(left_join, by = "Subject")

adex <- adex |>
  mutate_at(vars(matches("EX.*DOS")), 
            ~gsub(" ", "", .)) %>% 
  ungroup() |> 
  arrange(Subject, AVISITN) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  mutate(COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact))

irrae <- allae |> 
  filter(AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction" & !is.na(AETOXGR)) |> 
  left_join(
    adex |> distinct(Subject, VISIT, VISITNUM, EXSTDT),
    by = c("Subject", "ASTDT" = "EXSTDT")
  ) |> 
  arrange(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT, desc(AETOXGRN)) |> 
  group_by(COHORT, Subject, VISITNUM, VISIT) |> 
  mutate(n = n()) |> 
  slice_head(n=1) |> 
  ungroup()


n_fun <- function(df, labelstr) {
  num_sub <- length(unique(df$USUBJID))
  rcell(num_sub, format = sprintf_format("N=%d"), label = labelstr)
}

s_summary <- function(x) {
  format_range <- function(x) {
    vals <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    # Replace Inf/-Inf with "-"
    vals[is.infinite(vals)] <- "-"
    # Ensure output is character, to support "-"
    vals
  }
  
  if (is.numeric(x)) {
    in_rows(
      "Mean (SD)" = rcell(c(mean(x, na.rm = TRUE), sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)), format = "xx.x (xx.x)"),
      "Median" = rcell(median(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.x"),
      "Min, Max" = rcell(range(x, na.rm = TRUE), format = "xx.x, xx.x")
    )
  } else if (is.factor(x)) {
    fct <- as.list(table(x))
    do.call(in_rows, lapply(fct, rcell, format = "xx"))
  } else {
    stop("type not supported")
  }
}


# Participants treated
trted <- bind_rows(
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(DOS13COMP)) |> 
    mutate(trted = "Through Week 13"),
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(DOS25COMP)) |> 
    mutate(trted = "Through Week 25 Core Study Period"),
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(DOS97COMP)) |> 
    mutate(trted = "Through Week 97 OLE")
) |> 
  mutate(trted = factor(trted, levels = c("Through Week 13",
                                          "Through Week 25 Core Study Period",
                                          "Through Week 97 OLE")))

subj_trted <- basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |> 
  split_cols_by("COHORT") |> 
  add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
  count_occurrences(
    vars = "trted",
    show_labels = "visible",
    var_labels = "Participants treated:",
    section_div = " ",
    drop = FALSE
  ) |>
  build_table(trted, alt_counts_df = safflds)

# Duration of Exposure to Treatment
dur <- adex |>
  filter(DOS97 == "Y" &!is.na(EXOCCUR)) |>
  distinct(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXSTDTC) |>
  arrange(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXSTDTC) |>
  group_by(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID) |>
  slice_head(n = 1) |>
  ungroup() |>
  left_join(adex |>
              filter(DOS97 == "Y" &!is.na(EXOCCUR)) |>
              distinct(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXENDTC) |>
              arrange(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXENDTC) |>
              group_by(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID) |>
              slice_tail(n = 1) |>
              ungroup(),
            by = c("COHORT","Subject","USUBJID")) |>
  mutate(EXSTDTC = as.Date(EXSTDTC),
         EXENDTC = as.Date(EXENDTC)) |>
  derive_vars_duration(start_date = EXSTDTC, end_date = EXENDTC, new_var = DUR) |>
  mutate(DUR = floor(DUR/7) + 1)

# dur <- adex |>
#   filter(DOS97 == "Y" &!is.na(EXOCCUR)) |>
#   distinct(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXENDTC, AVISITN) |>
#   arrange(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID, EXENDTC) |>
#   group_by(COHORT,Subject, USUBJID) |>
#   slice_tail(n = 1) |>
#   ungroup() |>
#   mutate(DUR = AVISITN)

subj_dur <- basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
  split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
  add_overall_col("All Cohorts") |>
  analyze(
    "DUR", 
    afun = s_summary, 
    show_labels = "visible",
    var_labels = "Duration of Exposure to Treatment (weeks)",
    section_div = " "
  ) |>
  build_table(dur, alt_counts_df = safflds)


# Number of given infusions per participant
inf <- bind_rows(
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN <= 13) |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 13"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 13 & AVISITN <= 25) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 14 - 25"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 25 & AVISITN <= 49) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 26 - 49"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 49 & AVISITN <= 97) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 50 - 97"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN <= 97) |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 97")
) |> 
  distinct(AVISITN, COHORT, USUBJID, WEEK) |> 
  group_by(WEEK, COHORT, USUBJID) |> 
  summarise(`Number of given infusions per participant` = n(), .groups = "drop") 


# Number of missed infusions per participant
miss <- bind_rows(
  adex |> 
    filter(DOS13MISS == "Y") |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 13"),
  
  adex |>
    filter(is.na(DOS13MISS) & !is.na(DOS25MISS)) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 14 - 25"),
  
  adex |>
    filter(is.na(DOS25MISS) & !is.na(DOS49MISS)) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 26 - 49"),
  
  adex |>
    filter(is.na(DOS49MISS) & !is.na(DOS97MISS)) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 50 - 97"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(DOS97MISS)) |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 97")
) |> 
  distinct(AVISITN, COHORT, USUBJID, WEEK) |> 
  group_by(WEEK, COHORT, USUBJID) |> 
  summarise(AVAL = n(), .groups = "drop") |> 
  mutate(
    `Number of missed infusions per participant` = case_when(
      AVAL > 2 ~ ">2",
      AVAL >= 1 | AVAL <= 2 ~ "1 - 2",
      AVAL == 0 ~ "0",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) |> 
  select(-AVAL)


# Compliance category
comp <- bind_rows(
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN <= 13) |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 13"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 13 & AVISITN <= 25) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 14 - 25"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 25 & AVISITN <= 49) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 26 - 49"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN > 49 & AVISITN <= 97) |>
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 50 - 97"),
  
  adex |> 
    filter(!is.na(EXOCCUR) & AVISITN <= 97) |> 
    mutate(WEEK = "Weeks 1 - 97")
) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COMPLIANCE)) |> 
  distinct(AVISITN, WEEK, COHORT, USUBJID, COMPLIANCE) |> 
  group_by(WEEK, COHORT, USUBJID) |> 
  summarise(`Study Infusion compliance` = mean(COMPLIANCE, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(
    `Study Infusion compliance` = factor(case_when(
      `Study Infusion compliance` < 75 ~ "< 75%",
      `Study Infusion compliance` >= 75 ~ "75 - 100%"
    ), levels = c("< 75%", "75 - 100%"))
  )


weeks <- reduce(
  list(inf, miss, comp),
  full_join,
  by = c("WEEK", "COHORT", "USUBJID")
) |> 
  mutate(
    WEEK = factor(WEEK,
                  levels = c("Weeks 1 - 97",
                             "Weeks 1 - 13",
                             "Weeks 14 - 25",
                             "Weeks 26 - 49",
                             "Weeks 50 - 97")),
    `Number of missed infusions per participant` = ifelse(is.na(`Number of missed infusions per participant`), "0", `Number of missed infusions per participant`),
    `Number of missed infusions per participant` = factor(`Number of missed infusions per participant`, levels = c("0", "1 - 2", ">2"))
         )


subj_weeks <- basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |> 
  split_cols_by("COHORT") |> 
  add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
  split_rows_by("WEEK", section_div = "") |>
  summarize_row_groups("WEEK", cfun = n_fun) |>
  analyze_vars(
    "Number of given infusions per participant", 
    na_str = "-",
    .stats = c("mean_sd", "median", "range"),
    show_labels = "visible",
    section_div = " "
    ) |>
  analyze_vars(
    "Number of missed infusions per participant", 
    na_str = "-",
    .stats = "count_fraction",
    show_labels = "visible",
    section_div = " "
    ) |>
  analyze_vars(
    "Study Infusion compliance", 
    na_str = "-",
    .stats = "count_fraction",
    show_labels = "visible",
    section_div = " "
    ) |>
  build_table(weeks, alt_counts_df = safflds)


exp_table <- rbind(
  subj_trted,
  subj_dur,
  subj_weeks
)

exp_table |> 
  tt_to_df1()%>% 
  kable(booktabs = TRUE, 
        col.names = names(.), 
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.)))
        )
```

\newpage

### Individual Participant Profiles: Drug Exposure, Derived Weekly Dose Compliance, IRR Adverse Events and Action Taken

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

adex_irr  <- adex |> 
  left_join(irrae |> distinct(Subject, ASTDT, AESEV, AEACN), by = c("Subject", "EXSTDT" = "ASTDT")) |> 
  mutate(COMPLIANCE = ifelse(is.na(COMPLIANCE), 0, COMPLIANCE))

plot_subject_dose <- function(subj) {
  
  ex_irr <-  adex_irr |> filter(Subject == subj & !is.na(AESEV)) |>
    distinct(VISITNUM, AESEV)
  
  df <- adex_irr |> filter(Subject == subj)
  
  cohort <- df |> distinct(COHORT) |> pull()
  
  df |> 
    ggplot(aes(x = VISITNUM, y = COMPLIANCE)) +
    geom_line(color = "gray40", show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_point(aes(color = COMPCAT, shape = AEACN),
               size = 5,
               show.legend = TRUE) +
    scale_color_manual(
      name = "Weekly Dose Compliance (Derived)",
      values = c(
        "<50%" = "#E41A1C",
        "50-<75%" = "blue",
        "75-<90%" = "cyan",
        "90-100%" = "#4DAF4A",
        "Missing Dose Entry" = "gray"
      ),
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      name = "Action Taken",
      values = c(
        "Dose not changed" = 16,
        "Drug interrupted" = 17
      ),
      breaks = "Drug interrupted",
      na.value = 16
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      limits = c(-10, max(df$COMPLIANCE, na.rm = TRUE) + 5),
      breaks = seq(0, max(df$COMPLIANCE, na.rm = TRUE) + 5, 25),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks =  seq(
        min(adex_irr$VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE),
        max(adex_irr$VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE),
        by = 2
      ),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.01, 0.01)),
      limits = c(min(adex_irr$VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE), 
                 max(adex_irr$VISITNUM, na.rm = TRUE))
    ) +
    geom_vline(
      data = ex_irr,
      aes(xintercept = VISITNUM, linetype = AESEV),
      color = "#ffb000",
      size = 0.7,
      show.legend = TRUE
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
      name = "IRR Severity",
      values = c(
        "Mild" = "dotted",
        "Moderate" = "dotdash",
        "Severe" = "solid"
      ),
      drop = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_size_manual(
    name = "IRR Severity",
    values = c(
      "Mild" = 1.5,      # thin
      "Moderate" = 1.5,  # medium
      "Severe" = 1.5       # thick
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Treatment Week",
      y = "Dose Compliance %",
      title = paste0(cohort, " (", subj, ")")
    ) +
    theme_bw() +
    guides(
      color = guide_legend(
        title = "Dose Compliance (Derived)",
        override.aes = list(linetype = "blank"),
        nrow = 2,
        order = 1
        ),
      shape = guide_legend(
        title = "Action Taken", 
        override.aes = list(linetype = "blank"),
        order = 3
        ),
      linetype = guide_legend(
        title = "IRR Severity", 
        override.aes = list(shape = NA),
        order = 2
        )
    ) +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),
      
      legend.position = "bottom",   # (x, y) in normalized plot coordinates
      legend.justification = c("right", "bottom"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA), 
      
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14), 
    ) 
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

  p1 <- plot_subject_dose("0016-9001") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p2 <- plot_subject_dose("0016-9003") 
  p3 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9001") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p4 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9002")

  p5 <- plot_subject_dose("0016-9004") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p6 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9003") 
  p7 <- plot_subject_dose("2064-9002") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p8 <- plot_subject_dose("2065-9002")

  p9 <- plot_subject_dose("0016-9005") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p10 <- plot_subject_dose("0016-9006")
  p11 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9005") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p12 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9007") 
  p13 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9008") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p14 <- plot_subject_dose("2064-9003") 
  p15 <- plot_subject_dose("2064-9004") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p16 <- plot_subject_dose("2064-9005") 
  p17 <- plot_subject_dose("2065-9001") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p18 <- plot_subject_dose("2065-9004") 

  p19 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9004") + theme(legend.position = "none")
  p20 <- plot_subject_dose("0017-9006")

```
