\newpage

## Adverse Events

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

allae <- allae %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~gsub("#", "\\\\#", .)))

teae <- allae |> filter(TRTEMFL %in% "Y") |> 
  mutate(TRTEMFL = case_when(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" ~ "Yes",
                             TRTEMFL %in% "N" ~ "No",
                             TRUE ~ ""))

teaeirr <- teae |> filter(AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction") |> 
  mutate(
    AESEV = factor(
      AESEV,
      levels = c("Mild", "Moderate", "Severe"),
      ordered = TRUE
      )
  )

allaesumm <- allae |> filter(TRTEMFL %in% "Y") |>
  mutate(USUBJID_TEAE = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_SIRTEAE = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & AEREL %in% "Related", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_PPRTEAE = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & PROCREL %in% "Related", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_STEAE = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & AESER %in% "Yes", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_SIRSTEAE = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & AESER %in% "Yes" & AEREL %in% "Related", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_AESI = ifelse(AESI %in% "Yes", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_AESI2 = ifelse(AESI2 %in% "Yes", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_AESI3 = ifelse(AESI3 %in% "Yes", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_AESI4 = ifelse(AESI4 %in% "Yes", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_DISC = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & AEACN %in% "Drug withdrawn", USUBJID, NA_character_),
         USUBJID_DRED = ifelse(TRTEMFL %in% "Y" & AEACN %in% "Dose reduced", USUBJID, NA_character_)
         )

# SOC-PT Table function
# Table cell for SOC PT  table
soc_pt <- function(adae, adsl) {
  table_count_once_per_id <- function(df, termvar = "AEDECOD", idvar = "USUBJID", .N_col) {
    term_vals <- df[[termvar]]
    id_vals <- df[[idvar]]
    
    # Count each Participant only once per term (PT)
    unique_df <- df[!duplicated(paste(id_vals, term_vals)), ]
    term_counts <- table(unique_df[[termvar]])
    event_counts <- table(term_vals)
    
    formatted <- mapply(function(n, events, label) { # Format as "xx (xx.x%)"
      pct <- (n / .N_col)*100
      rcell(c(n, pct, events), format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f) [%d]"))
    }, n = term_counts, events = event_counts, label = names(term_counts), SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
    
    in_rows(.list = formatted)
  }
  
  table_count_once_per_id1 <- function(df, termvar = "AEBODSYS", idvar = "USUBJID", .N_col) {
    term_vals <- df[[termvar]]
    id_vals <- df[[idvar]]
    
    # Count each subject only once per term (PT)
    unique_df <- df[!duplicated(paste(id_vals, term_vals)), ]
    term_counts <- table(unique_df[[termvar]])
    event_counts <- table(term_vals)
    
    formatted <- mapply(function(n, events, label) { # Format as "xx (xx.x%)"
      pct <- (n / .N_col)*100
      rcell(c(n, pct, events), format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f) [%d]"))
    }, n = term_counts, events = event_counts, label = names(term_counts), SIMPLIFY = FALSE)
    
    in_rows(.list = formatted)
  }
  
  adae <- adae |>
    select(USUBJID, COHORT, AEBODSYS, AEDECOD) |>
    mutate(
      AEDECOD = as.factor(AEDECOD),
      AEBODSYS = as.factor(AEBODSYS),
      USUBJID = factor(USUBJID),
      COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact)
    )
  adae_soc_pt <- rbind(
    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col("All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("USUBJID",
              afun = s_events_patients,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              section_div = "") |>
      build_table(adae, alt_counts_df = adsl),
    
    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col("All Cohorts") |>
      split_rows_by(
        "AEBODSYS",
        split_fun = drop_split_levels,
        section_div = "",
        child_labels = "hidden"
      ) |>
      analyze("AEBODSYS",
              afun = table_count_once_per_id1,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              indent_mod = 0,
              na_str = "") |>
      analyze("AEDECOD",
              afun = table_count_once_per_id,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              indent_mod = 1,
              na_str = "") |>
      build_table(adae, alt_counts_df = adsl) |> 
      trim_rows() |>
      sort_at_path(
        c("AEBODSYS", "*", "AEBODSYS"),
        scorefun = score_occurrences,
        decreasing = TRUE
        ) |>
      sort_at_path(
        c("AEBODSYS", "*", "AEDECOD"),
        scorefun =score_occurrences,
        decreasing = TRUE
        )
  )
  adae_soc_pt
}


# PT Table function
pt <- function(adae, adsl) {
  
  # Table cell for SOC PT  table
  table_count_once_per_id <- function(df, termvar = "AEDECOD", idvar = "USUBJID", .N_col) {
    term_vals <- df[[termvar]]
    id_vals <- df[[idvar]]

    unique_df <- df[!duplicated(paste(id_vals, term_vals)), ] # Count Participant only once per PT
    term_counts <- table(unique_df[[termvar]])
    event_counts <- table(term_vals)

    formatted <- mapply(function(n, events, label) { # Format as "xx (xx.x%)"
      pct <- (n / .N_col)*100
      rcell(c(n, pct, events), format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]"))
    }, n = term_counts, events = event_counts, label = names(term_counts), SIMPLIFY = FALSE)

    in_rows(.list = formatted)
  }
  
  
  if(any(grepl("Not Coded", adae$AEDECOD))){
    adae_pt <- rbind(
    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("USUBJID",
              afun = s_events_patients,
              section_div = "") |>
      build_table(adae,
                  alt_counts_df = adsl),

    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("AEDECOD",
              afun = table_count_once_per_id,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              indent_mod = 1) |>
      build_table(adae |>
                    filter(!grepl("Not Coded", AEDECOD)),
                  alt_counts_df = adsl) |>
      sort_at_path(path = c("AEDECOD"),
                   scorefun = score_occurrences),

    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |> # Handling Not Coded terms separately
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("AEDECOD",
              afun = table_count_once_per_id,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              indent_mod = 1) |>
      build_table(adae |>
                    filter(grepl("Not Coded", AEDECOD)),
                  alt_counts_df = adsl) 
    
    # |>
    #   sort_at_path(path = c("AEDECOD"),
    #                scorefun = score_occurrences)
  ) |>
    trim_rows()
  } else {
    adae_pt <- rbind(
    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("USUBJID",
              afun = s_events_patients,
              section_div = "",
              na_str = "") |>
      build_table(adae,
                  alt_counts_df = adsl),

    basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
      split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
      add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |>
      analyze("AEDECOD",
              afun = table_count_once_per_id,
              show_labels = "hidden",
              indent_mod = 1,
              na_str = "") |>
      build_table(adae |>
                    filter(!grepl("Not Coded", AEDECOD)),
                  alt_counts_df = adsl) |>
      sort_at_path(path = c("AEDECOD"),
                   scorefun = score_occurrences)
  ) |>
    trim_rows()
  }

  adae_pt
}


# Empty Table
empty_table <- data.frame(Message = "No Eligible Participants") |>
  gt() |>
  cols_label(Message = "") |>
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(weight = "bold", align = "center"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(50),
    table.align = "center",
    column_labels.hidden = TRUE
  )
```

### Summary of Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

s_events_patients <- function(x, row_label = "Row", .N_col, ...) {
  in_rows(.list = setNames(list(
    rcell(
      c(length(unique(x)),
        100 * length(unique(x)) / .N_col,
        length(x)),
      format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  ), row_label))
}

summae <- rbind(
  basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
    split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
    add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 

    # TEAE
    analyze("USUBJID_TEAE",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Participants with at least one TEAE"),
            show_labels = "hidden"
    ) |>
    # Study Intervention-Related TEAE
    analyze("USUBJID_SIRTEAE",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Study Intervention-Related TEAE"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            indent_mod = 1
            # ,
            # section_div = ""
    ) |> 
    # Protocol Procedure-Related TEAE
    analyze("USUBJID_PPRTEAE",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Protocol Procedure-Related TEAE"),
            show_labels = "hidden"
            # ,
            # section_div = ""
    ) |>
    # Serious TEAE
    analyze("USUBJID_STEAE",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Serious TEAE"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
    ) |>
    # Study Intervention-Related Serious TEAE
    analyze("USUBJID_SIRSTEAE",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Study Intervention-Related Serious TEAE"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            indent_mod = 1
            # ,
            # section_div = ""
    ) |> 
    build_table(allaesumm, alt_counts_df = safflds),
  
  basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
    split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
    add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
    
    # TEAE by Maximum Severity
    count_occurrences_by_grade(
      var = "AETOXGR",
      var_labels = "TEAE by Maximum Severity",
      show_labels = "visible"
      # ,
      # section_div = ""
    ) |>
    # AESI
    analyze("USUBJID_AESI",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "AESI"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
    ) |>
    # Infusion related reaction (moderate or severe), including allergic reactions and anaphylaxis
    analyze("USUBJID_AESI2",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Infusion related reaction (moderate or severe), including allergic reactions and anaphylaxis"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            indent_mod = 1
    ) |> 
    # ALT or AST >3x ULN
    analyze("USUBJID_AESI3",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "ALT or AST >3x ULN"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            indent_mod = 1
    ) |> 
    # Total bilirubin >1.5x ULN
    analyze("USUBJID_AESI4",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "Total bilirubin >1.5x ULN"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
            indent_mod = 1
            # ,
            # section_div = ""
    ) |> 
    # TEAE Leading to Dose Reduction
    # analyze("USUBJID_DRED",
    #         afun = s_events_patients,
    #         extra_args  = list(row_label = "TEAE Leading to Dose Reduction"),
    #         show_labels = "hidden",
    # ) |>
    # TEAE Leading to Early Discontinuation of Study Intervention
    analyze("USUBJID_DISC",
            afun = s_events_patients,
            extra_args  = list(row_label = "TEAE Leading to Early Discontinuation of Study Intervention"),
            show_labels = "hidden",
    ) |>
    build_table(allaesumm, alt_counts_df = safflds)
)

summae  %>%
  tt_to_df1() %>%
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events by System Organ Class and Preferred Term

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one TEAE" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

teae_soc_pt <- soc_pt(teae |> 
                        mutate(AEDECOD = as.factor(AEDECOD),
                               AEBODSYS = as.factor(AEBODSYS)), 
                      safflds) # TEAE SOC PT Table

teae_soc_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Treatment-Related Adverse Events by System Organ Class and Preferred Term​

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

ae_rel <- allae |> 
  filter(AEREL == "Related") 

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Study Intervention-Related AE" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

ae_rel_soc_pt <- soc_pt(ae_rel, safflds) 

ae_rel_soc_pt %>% 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events \>= Grade 3 by System Organ Class and Preferred Term

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

teae_ge3 <- teae |> 
  filter(AETOXGRN >= 3) 

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Treatment Emergent AE (CTCAE Grade >= 3)" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

teae_ge3_soc_pt <- soc_pt(teae_ge3, safflds) # TEAE AESI SOC PT Table

teae_ge3_soc_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Serious Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events by System Organ Class and Preferred Term

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

teae_sae <- teae |> 
  filter(AESER == "Yes")

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Treatment Emergent SAE" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

teae_sae_soc_pt <- soc_pt(teae_sae, safflds) # TEAE SAE SOC PT Table

teae_sae_soc_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events Leading to Discontinuation by System Organ Class and Preferred Term​

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

teae_disc <- teae |> 
  filter(AEACN == "Drug withdrawn") 

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Treatment Emergent AE Leading to Discontinuation of Study Intervention" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

teae_disc_soc_pt <- soc_pt(teae_disc, safflds) # TEAE Rel SOC PT Table

teae_disc_soc_pt <- tt_to_df1(teae_disc_soc_pt) 

collabels <- setNames(
  lapply(names(teae_disc_soc_pt), function(nm) html(str_replace(nm, "\\(", " ("))),
  names(teae_disc_soc_pt)
)

collabels_cent <- colnames(teae_disc_soc_pt)[-1]

if(nrow(teae_disc_soc_pt) <= 1){
  empty_table
} else {
  soc_pt(teae_disc, safflds) |> 
    tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
}
```

\newpage

### Overall Summary of Treatment Emergent IRR Events

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

simple_analysisPCT <- function(x, .N_col){
  tbl <- table(x, useNA = "ifany")
  in_rows(
    .list = lapply(
      names(tbl),
      function(levels){
        rcell(
          c(
            tbl[[levels]],
            tbl[[levels]]/.N_col
          ),
          format = "xx (xx.x%)"
        )
      }
    ),
    .labels = names(tbl)
  ) 
}


sumirrteae <- rbind(
  
  basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
    split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
    add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
    # TEAE
    summarize_num_patients(
      var = "USUBJID",
      .stats = "unique",
      .labels = "Participants with at least one TEAE IRR Event"
    ) |> 
    # Treatment-related TEAE
    count_patients_with_event(
      "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AEREL" = "Related"),
      .labels = "Treatment-related TEAE",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |> 
    # Serious TEAE
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AESER" = "Yes"),
      .labels = "Serious TEAE",
      .indent_mods = -1
    ) |> 
    # Study Intervention-Related Serious TEAE
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AESER" = "Yes", "AEREL" = "Related"),
      .labels = "Study Intervention-Related Serious TEAE",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |> 
    # Fatal TEAE
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AEOUT" = "Fatal"),
      .labels = "Fatal TEAE",
      .indent_mods = -1
    ) |> 
    # Study Intervention-Related Fatal TEAE
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AEOUT" = "Fatal", "AEREL" = "Related"),
      .labels = "Study Intervention-Related Fatal TEAE",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |> 
    build_table(teaeirr, alt_counts_df = safflds),
  
  basic_table(show_colcounts = TRUE) |>
    split_cols_by("COHORT") |>
    add_overall_col(label = "All Cohorts") |> 
    # TEAE by Maximum Severity
    count_occurrences_by_grade(
      var = "AESEV",
      var_labels = "TEAE by Maximum Severity",
      show_labels = "visible",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |>
    # TEAE Leading to Discontinuation of Study Intervention
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AEACN" = "Drug withdrawn"),
      .labels = "TEAE Leading to Discontinuation of Study Intervention",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |>
    # TEAE Leading to Dose Reduction
    # count_patients_with_event(
    #   var = "USUBJID",
    #   filters = c("AEACN" = "Dose reduced"),
    #   .labels = "TEAE Leading to Dose Reduction",
    #   .indent_mods = 0
    # ) |>
    # TEAE Leading to Dose Interruption
    count_patients_with_event(
      var = "USUBJID",
      filters = c("AEACN" = "Drug interrupted"),
      .labels = "TEAE Leading to Dose Interruption",
      .indent_mods = 0
    ) |>
    build_table(teaeirr, alt_counts_df = safflds)
  
)

sumirrteae %>%
  tt_to_df1() %>%
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\newpage

### Moderate to Severe IRR Event AESIs by System Organ Class and Preferred Term​

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

aesi_irr <- teae |> 
  filter(AESEV %in% c("Mild", "Moderate") & AESI == "Yes" & AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction") 

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Mild or Moderate IRR Event AESI" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

aesi_irr_soc_pt <- soc_pt(aesi_irr, safflds) # TEAE AESI SOC PT Table

aesi_irr_soc_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Moderate to severe Non-IRR Event AESIs by System Organ Class and Preferred Term​

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

aesi_nirr <- teae |> 
  filter(AESEV %in% c("Mild", "Moderate") & AESI == "Yes" & !AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction") 

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one Mild or Moderate Non-IRR Event AESI" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

aesi_nirr_soc_pt <- soc_pt(aesi_nirr, safflds) # TEAE AESI SOC PT Table

if(nrow(aesi_nirr) == 0){
  empty_table
} else {
  aesi_nirr_soc_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
}
```

\newpage

### Treatment Emergent AE Summary by MedDRA Preferred Term (Sorted by Number of Events)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one TEAE" =
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

teae_pt <- pt(teae |> 
                mutate(AEDECOD = as.factor(AEDECOD),
                       AEBODSYS = as.factor(AEBODSYS),
                       COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact)), 
              safflds) # TEAE PT Table

teae_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(trimws(.) == "0 (0.0) [0]", "", .))) %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Treatment Emergent IRR Symptoms Summary by MedDRA Preferred Term

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

s_events_patients <- function(x, labelstr, .N_col) {
  in_rows(
    "Participants with at least one IRR" = 
      rcell(c(
  length(unique(x)), 
  (length(unique(x)) / .N_col)*100,
  length(x)
  ), 
  format = sprintf_format("%d (%.1f%%) [%d]")
    )
  )
}

irrteae <- irr |> 
  mutate(IRTERM_PT = ifelse(is.na(IRTERM_PT), 
                            paste0("Not Coded* (", IRTERM, ")"),
                            IRTERM_PT)) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  mutate(AEDECOD = as.factor(IRTERM_PT),
         AEBODSYS = as.factor(IRTERM_SOC),
         COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact))

irrteae_pt <- pt(irrteae, safflds) # TEAE PT Table

irrteae_pt |> 
  tt_to_df1() |>  
  mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(trimws(.) == "0 (0.0) [0]", "", .))) %>% 
  mutate(across(1, ~str_replace_all(., "%", "\\\\%"))) %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), trimws)) %>%
  kable(booktabs = TRUE,
        escape = FALSE,
        col.names = names(.),
        align = paste0("l", strrep("c", ncol(.) - 1))
  )
```

\footnotesize Note: n(%)\[events\]

\par

\newpage

### Serious Adverse Events Summary by Participant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

aesumvars <- c("Participant ID, Cohort, Age(months)/Sex", 
               "AEID",
               "SYSTEM ORGAN CLASS, Preferred Term, Term",
               "S: Start Date(Day), E: End Date(Day)",
               "CTCAE Grading, Seriousness",
               "Action Taken D: DNL126, A: AE",
               "Outcome",
               "Relationship D: DNL126, P: Protocol Procedure")

saesumm <- allae %>% 
  filter(AESER == "Yes") %>% 
  select(aesumvars) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  kable(format = "latex",
          booktabs = TRUE,
          escape = FALSE,
          longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("repeat_header")   # <— repeat header on each page
    )

saesumm |>
  column_spec(1, width = "2cm") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "1cm") |>
  column_spec(3, width = "4.5cm") |>
  column_spec(4, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(5, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(6, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(7, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(8, width = "2.8cm")
```

\newpage

### Treatment-Emergent Adverse Events \>= Grade 3 Summary by Participant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

sevtaesumm <- teae %>%
  filter(AETOXGR %in% c("Grade 3", "Grade 4", "Grade 5")) %>%
  select(aesumvars) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  kable(format = "latex",
          booktabs = TRUE,
          escape = FALSE,
          longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("repeat_header")   # <— repeat header on each page
    )

sevtaesumm |>
  column_spec(1, width = "2cm") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "1cm") |>
  column_spec(3, width = "4.5cm") |>
  column_spec(4, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(5, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(6, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(7, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(8, width = "2.8cm")
```

\newpage

### Moderate to Severe IRR AESIs Summary by Participant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

modirrsumm <- allae %>%
  filter(AESEV %in% c("Mild", "Moderate") & AESI == "Yes" & (AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction"|AETERM %in% "IRR")) %>%
  select(aesumvars) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  kable(format = "latex",
          booktabs = TRUE,
          escape = FALSE,
          longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("repeat_header")   # <— repeat header on each page
    )

modirrsumm |>
  column_spec(1, width = "2cm") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "1cm") |>
  column_spec(3, width = "4.5cm") |>
  column_spec(4, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(5, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(6, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(7, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(8, width = "2.8cm")
```

\newpage

### Moderate to Severe Non-IRR AESIs Summary by Participant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

modnirrsumm <- allae %>%
  filter(AESEV %in% c("Mild", "Moderate") & AESI == "Yes" & !(AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction"|AETERM %in% "IRR")) %>% 
select(aesumvars) %>% 
  distinct() %>% 
  kable(format = "latex",
          booktabs = TRUE,
          escape = FALSE,
          longtable = TRUE
    ) %>%
    kable_styling(
      latex_options = c("repeat_header")   # <— repeat header on each page
    )


if(nrow( allae %>%
  filter(AESEV %in% c("Mild", "Moderate") & AESI == "Yes" & !AEDECOD %in% "Infusion related reaction")) == 0) {
  empty_table
} else {
  modnirrsumm |>
  column_spec(1, width = "2cm") |>
  column_spec(2, width = "1cm") |>
  column_spec(3, width = "4.5cm") |>
  column_spec(4, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(5, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(6, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(7, width = "3cm") |>
  column_spec(8, width = "2.8cm")
}
```

\newpage

## Safety Lab **Trend Plot with Outlier Indicators**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

cent <- central_lab |> 
  mutate(PARAM = ifelse(!is.na(LBORRESU), paste0(LBTEST, " (", LBORRESU, ")"), LBTEST),
         LBORRES = gsub("[<>]", "", LBORRES),
         LBORRES = as.numeric(LBORRES),
         LBDT = as.Date(LBDT)) |> 
  distinct(Subject = SUBJID, VISIT, ADT = LBDT, CAT = LBCAT, PARAM, TEST = LBTEST, IND = LBNRIND, AVAL = LBORRES, LOW = LBORNRLO, HIGH = LBORNRHI) |> 
  left_join(safflds) |> 
  filter(!is.na(COHORT) &!is.na(AVAL)) |> 
  # filter(!is.na(LBORRES) & !grepl("Unscheduled|Screening", VISIT)) |> 
  left_join(ex |> distinct(Subject, InstanceName, EXSTDAT),
            by = c("Subject", "ADT" = "EXSTDAT")) |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |>
  mutate(UNSC = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), "Y", NA_character_),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), InstanceName, VISIT),
         DT = ADT) |> 
  derive_vars_dy(TRTSDT, exprs(DT)) |> 
  mutate(VISIT1 = ifelse(DY > 0, paste0("Week ", ceiling(DY/7)), paste0("Week ", floor(DY/7))),
         VISIT =  ifelse(is.na(VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT)) |>
  group_by(PARAM) |> 
  mutate(LOW_coh = min(LOW, na.rm = TRUE),
         HIGH_coh = max(HIGH, na.rm = TRUE),
         INDNULL = ifelse(all(is.na(LOW)) & all(is.na(HIGH)), "Not Defined", NA_character_), 
  ) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  mutate(IND = ifelse(INDNULL %in% "Not Defined", INDNULL, IND),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Screening", VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Week", "Wk", VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Baseline", "BL", VISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         VISITNUM = ifelse(VISIT == "BL", 0, VISITNUM),
         IND = factor(IND, levels = c("NORMAL", "LOW", "HIGH", "Not Defined")),
         COHORT = factor(COHORT, levels = cohfact)
  ) |> 
  select(-InstanceName, -VISIT1) |> 
  arrange(COHORT, Subject, PARAM, VISITNUM, AVAL)

# Plot
paramplot <- function(df, 
                      param,
                      label_low  = "Minimum Lower Reference Range",
                      label_high = "Maximum Upper Reference Range"){

  df <- df |> filter(PARAM %in% param)
  
  color_palette <- c(
    "#E69F00", # orange
    "#56B4E9", # sky blue
    "#009E73", # bluish green
    "#F0E442", # yellow
    "#0072B2", # blue
    "#D55E00", # vermillion
    "#CC79A7", # reddish purple
    "#999999", # grey
    "#332288", # dark blue
    "#88CCEE", # light blue
    "#44AA99", # green teal
    "#117733", # dark green
    "#DDCC77", # mustard
    "#AA4499", # magenta
    "#661100", # brown
    "#6699CC", # steel blue
    "#888888", # medium grey
    "#1B9E77", # teal green (from ColorBrewer)
    "#E7298A", # pink (from ColorBrewer)
    "#A6761D" # olive brown
  )
  
  
  low_ref <- ifelse(!all(is.na(df$LOW_coh)), unique(df$LOW_coh), NA)
  high_ref <- unique(df$HIGH_coh)
  
  plot <- ggplot(df,
         aes(
           x = VISITNUM,
           y = AVAL,
           group = Subject,
           colour = Subject,
           linetype = COHORT
         )
  ) +
    geom_point(aes(shape = IND, size = 5)) +
    geom_line() +
    scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(unique(df$VISITNUM), 110) |> round_half_up() |> unique(), 
                       limits = c(min(df$VISITNUM), 110)|> round_half_up(),
                       labels = c(unique(df$VISIT), "Week 110")
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = color_palette) +
    theme_bw() +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
      axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      strip.background = element_blank(),
      
      legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      legend.text  = element_text(size = 12),
      
      legend.position = "bottom",
      legend.box = "vertical",
      legend.justification = "right",
      legend.box.just = "right",
      legend.spacing.y = unit(2, "pt"),
      # legend.justification = c("right", "bottom"),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = NA, color = NA), 
      
      plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 20), 
      
    ) +
    scale_linetype_manual(
      values = c(
        "Cohort A1" = "solid",
        "Cohort A2" = 22,
        "Cohort A3" = 44,
        "Cohort B1" = "dotdash"
      )
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(
      values = c(
        "HIGH" = 17,
        "NORMAL" = 16,
        "LOW" = 25,
        "Not Defined" = 16
      )
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("Original Results", 40L),
      # title = unique(df$PARAM)
      title = NULL
    ) +
    guides(
      linetype = guide_legend(order = 1, title = NULL),  # Cohort
      color    = guide_legend(order = 2,
                              ncol = 8,
                              title = NULL,
                              override.aes = list(line = NA, 
                                                  shape = 16, 
                                                  size = 4,
                                                  linetype = NA)),  # Subject
      shape    = guide_legend(order = 3,
                              title = "Normalized Indicator (Age & Gender)",
                              override.aes = list(size = 4)),
      size = "none"
    )
  
  plot
}


# Listing
paramlist <- function(df, param){
  
  df1 <- df |>
    filter(PARAM %in% param & IND %in% c("LOW", "HIGH")) |> 
    mutate(
      LOW = ifelse(is.na(LOW), "-", as.character(LOW)),
      HIGH = ifelse(is.na(HIGH), "-", as.character(HIGH)),
      LOHI = paste0(LOW, "/", HIGH),
      LOHI = ifelse(trimws(LOHI) == "/", "", LOHI)
    )
  
  if("TPT" %in% names(df)){
    df1 <- df1 |> 
      select(
        `Cohort` = COHORT,
        `Participant ID` = Subject,
        Category = CAT,
        Parameter = PARAM,
        Visit = VISIT,
        Timepoint = TPT,
        `Assessment Date` = ADT,
        `Original Values` = AVAL,
        `Lower/Upper Limit` = LOHI,
        Indication = IND
      )
  } else {
    df1 <- df1 |> 
      select(
        `Cohort` = COHORT,
        `Participant ID` = Subject,
        Category = CAT,
        Parameter = PARAM,
        Visit = VISIT,
        `Assessment Date` = ADT,
        `Original Values` = AVAL,
        `Lower/Upper Limit` = LOHI,
        Indication = IND
      )
  }
  
  kable(df1,
        align = rep("c", ncol(df1))
        # ,
        # caption = paste0("\\textbf{", param, "}")
  ) |>
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE) |>
    kable_styling(font_size = 9,
                  latex_options = c("striped", "hold_position"),
                  position = "left") 
}
```

### Biochemistry

#### ALT/SGPT (U/L)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

```

```{r}
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

### Evaluation of Drug-Induced Serious Hepatotoxicity (eDISH) Plot

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 12

hy_dat <- cent |> 
  filter(TEST %in% c("Total Bilirubin", "AST/SGOT", "ALT/SGPT", "Alkaline Phosphatase")) |> 
  rename(ULN = HIGH) |> 
  mutate(xULN = AVAL / ULN) |> 
  select(Subject, COHORT, ADT, VISIT, VISITNUM, TEST, xULN) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = TEST, values_from = xULN, values_fn = max) %>%
  rename(
    ALT  = `ALT/SGPT`,
    BILI = `Total Bilirubin`,
    AST  = `AST/SGOT`,
    ALP  = `Alkaline Phosphatase`
  ) |> 
  filter(!is.na(ALT), !is.na(BILI))

base_dates <- cent %>%
  group_by(Subject) %>%
  summarise(baseline_date = min(ADT, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")


log_breaks <- c(0.1, 0.2, 0.5, 1, 2, 3, 5, 10, 20, 50, 100)
lims <- c(0.1, 100) 

alt_hy <- ggplot(hy_dat, aes(x = ALT, y = BILI)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Subject), alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, color = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "grey40") +
  scale_x_log10(limits = lims, breaks = log_breaks, minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_log10(limits = lims, breaks = log_breaks, minor_breaks = NULL) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "ALT vs BILI (xULN)", x = "Alanine aminotransferase", y = "Total Bilirubin") +
  annotate("text", x = 20, y = 90,   label = "Potential Hy's Law", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 20, y = 0.1, label = "Temple's Corollary",  fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 90,   label = "Cholestasis", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = 0.1,label = "Normal/Near-Normal", hjust = 0, vjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  guides(color = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"), 
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")   
  )

ast_hy <- ggplot(hy_dat, aes(x = AST, y = BILI)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = Subject), alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 3, color = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 2, color = "grey40") +
  scale_x_log10(limits = lims, breaks = log_breaks, minor_breaks = NULL) +
  scale_y_log10(limits = lims, breaks = log_breaks, minor_breaks = NULL) +
  coord_fixed(ratio = 1) +
  labs(title = "AST vs BILI (xULN)", x = "Aspartate aminotransferase", y = "Total Bilirubin") +
  annotate("text", x = 20, y = 90,   label = "Potential Hy's Law", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 20, y = 0.1, label = "Temple's Corollary",  fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 90,   label = "Cholestasis", fontface = 2) +
  annotate("text", x = 0.3, y = 0.1,label = "Normal/Near-Normal", hjust = 0, vjust = 1, fontface = 2) +
  # guides(color = "none") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    plot.title  = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"), 
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold")   
  )


hy_tab <- hy_dat |> 
  filter(ALT >= 3 | AST >= 3)
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| 
foot <- paste("Near Normal (Total Bilirubin : ≤ 2xULN,  ALT/AST : ≤ 3xULN)", 
              "Cholestasis (Total Bilirubin : > 2xULN,  ALT/AST : < 3xULN)",
              "Hy's Law Quadrant (Total Bilirubin : > 2xULN, ALT/AST : > 3xULN)",
              "Temple's Corollary (Total Bilirubin : <= 2xULN, ALT/AST : > 3xULN)",
              "",
              "Data points represent lab evaluations done at the same timepoint.",
              sep = "\n")

(alt_hy + ast_hy) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = foot,
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

#### Participants in eDISH Hy's law quadrant

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

if(nrow(hy_tab) == 0){
  empty_table
}
```

## **ECG Trend Plot with Outlier Indicators**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

eganr <- egrange |>
  mutate(
    AGEY_LO = as.numeric(ASAGEYR_LO),
    AGEY_HI = as.numeric(ASAGEYR_HI),
    PARAMCD = ifelse(PARAMCD %in% "EGHRMN", "HR", PARAMCD)
  )

ecgdat <- ecg |> 
  inner_join(safflds) |> 
  left_join(scr |> select(Subject, BRTHDT)) |> 
  mutate(VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", FolderName), "Week 25", FolderName),
         ADT = as.Date(EGDAT), 
         TPT = case_when(EGTPT %in% "PRE_1" ~ "PRE-DOSE",
                           EGTPT %in% "POSTDOSE" ~ "POST-DOSE",
                           TRUE ~ NA_character_),
         TPT1 = case_when(EGTPT %in% "PRE_1" ~ -0.25,
                           EGTPT %in% "POSTDOSE" ~ 0.25,
                           TRUE ~ NA_real_),
         CAT = "ECG"
         ) |> 
  left_join(ex |> distinct(Subject, InstanceName1 = InstanceName, EXSTDAT),
            by = c("Subject", "ADT" = "EXSTDAT")) |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |>
  mutate(UNSC = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), "Y", NA_character_),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), InstanceName1, VISIT),
         DT = ADT) |> 
  derive_vars_dy(TRTSDT, exprs(DT)) |> 
  mutate(VISIT1 = ifelse(DY > 0, paste0("Week ", ceiling(DY/7)), paste0("Week ", floor(DY/7))),
         VISIT =  ifelse(is.na(VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Screening", VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Week", "Wk", VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Baseline", "BL", VISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         VISITNUM = ifelse(VISIT == "BL", 0, VISITNUM),
         VISITNUM1 = VISITNUM,
         VISITNUM = ifelse(!is.na(TPT), VISITNUM+TPT1, VISITNUM)
  ) |> 
  distinct(COHORT, Subject, CAT, VISIT, VISITNUM, VISITNUM1, TPT, ADT, BRTHDT, 
         HR, PRAG, QRSAG, QTAG, QTCFAG) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("HR", "PRAG", "QRSAG", "QTAG", "QTCFAG"), 
               names_to = "PARAMCD",
               values_to = "AVAL") |> 
  filter(!is.na(AVAL)) |> 
  mutate(
    AGEV = as.numeric((ADT - BRTHDT + 1) / 30.43750),
    ASAGEYR = AGEV / 12) |> 
  left_join(eganr,
    by = "PARAMCD",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  filter(
    # if no age bounds
    (is.na(AGEY_LO) & is.na(AGEY_HI)) |
      # if both age bounds
      ((ASAGEYR) >= AGEY_LO & (ASAGEYR) < AGEY_HI) |
      # if lower age bound only
      ((ASAGEYR) >= AGEY_LO & is.na(AGEY_HI))
  ) |>
  derive_var_anrind() |> 
  mutate(
    PARAM = case_when(
      PARAMCD == "HR" ~ "HR (beats/min)",
      PARAMCD == "PRAG" ~ "PRAG (msecs)",
      PARAMCD == "QRSAG" ~ "QRSAG (msecs)",
      PARAMCD == "QTAG" ~ "QTAG (msecs)",
      PARAMCD == "QTCFAG" ~ "QTCFAG (msecs)"
    ),
    LOW = ANRLO,
    HIGH = ANRHI,
    IND = ANRIND
      ) |> 
  group_by(PARAMCD) |> 
  mutate(LOW_coh = min(LOW),
         HIGH_coh = max(HIGH)) |> 
  ungroup()
```

### Heart Rate (beats/min)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

paramplot(ecgdat, "HR (beats/min)")
```

\newpage

### Aggregate QRS Interval (msecs)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

paramplot(ecgdat, "QRSAG (msecs)")
```

\newpage

### Aggregate QTcF Interval (msecs)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

paramplot(ecgdat, "QTCFAG (msecs)")
```

\newpage

### Aggregate QT Interval (msecs)

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

paramplot(ecgdat, "QTAG (msecs)")
```

\newpage

## Vital Signs **Trend Plot with Outlier Indicators**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8

vsanr <- vsrange |>
  mutate(
    AGEM_LO = as.numeric(AGE_LOWER),
    AGEM_HI = as.numeric(AGE_UPPER)
  )

vsdat <- vs |> 
  inner_join(safflds) |> 
  left_join(scr |> select(Subject, BRTHDT)) |> 
  mutate(VSTIM = str_pad(VSTIM, 5, "left", "0"),,
         FolderName = ifelse(FolderName %in% "Week", InstanceName, FolderName),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Week 25", FolderName), "Week 25", FolderName),
         VSDTC = ifelse(!is.na(VSTIM), 
                        paste0(as.character(VSDAT), "T", VSTIM), 
                        as.character(VSDAT)),
         ADTM = convert_dtc_to_dtm(VSDTC),
         ADT = convert_dtc_to_dt(VSDTC),
         TPT = VSTPT1,
         CAT = "VS"
         # ,
         # VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         # VISITNUM = case_when(VISIT %in% "Baseline" ~ 0,
         #                      VISIT %in% "Screening" ~ -1,
         #                      TRUE ~ VISITNUM)
         ) |> 
  left_join(ex |> distinct(Subject, InstanceName1 = InstanceName, EXSTDAT),
            by = c("Subject", "ADT" = "EXSTDAT")) |> 
  left_join(ex_EXSTDT) |>
  mutate(UNSC = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), "Y", NA_character_),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("unschedu", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), InstanceName1, VISIT),
         DT = ADT) |> 
  derive_vars_dy(TRTSDT, exprs(DT)) |> 
  mutate(VISIT1 = ifelse(DY > 0, paste0("Week ", ceiling(DY/7)), paste0("Week ", floor(DY/7))),
         VISIT =  ifelse(is.na(VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("Screening", VISIT), VISIT1, VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Week", "Wk", VISIT),
         VISIT = gsub("Baseline", "BL", VISIT),
         VISITNUM = parse_number(VISIT),
         VISITNUM = ifelse(VISIT == "BL", 0, VISITNUM)
  ) |> 
  distinct(COHORT, Subject, CAT, VISIT, VISITNUM, TPT, ADT, ADTM, BRTHDT,
           PULSE, RES, SYSBP, DIABP, PULSOX, TEMP = TEMP_STD) |> 
  rename(RESP = RES, POX = PULSOX) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = c("PULSE", "RESP", "SYSBP", "DIABP", "POX", "TEMP"), 
               names_to = "PARAMCD",
               values_to = "AVAL") |> 
  filter(!is.na(AVAL)) |> 
  mutate(
    AGEV = as.numeric((ADT - BRTHDT + 1) / 30.43750),
    ASAGEYR = AGEV / 12) |> 
  left_join(vsanr,
            by = "PARAMCD",
            relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) |>
  filter(

    # no age bounds
    is.na(AGEM_LO) & is.na(AGEM_HI) |

      # both age bounds
      (AGEV >= AGEM_LO & AGEV < AGEM_HI) |

      # upper bound only
      (is.na(AGEM_LO) & AGEV < AGEM_HI) |

      # lower bound only
      (AGEV >= AGEM_LO & is.na(AGEM_HI))
  ) |>
  derive_var_anrind() |> 
  mutate(
    PARAM = case_when(
      PARAMCD == "PULSE" ~ "PULSE (beats/min)",
      PARAMCD == "RESP" ~ "Resp Rate (msecs)",
      PARAMCD == "SYSBP" ~ "SYSBP (mmHg)",
      PARAMCD == "DIABP" ~ "DIABP (mmHg)",
      PARAMCD == "POX" ~ "Pulse OX (spO2)",
      PARAMCD == "TEMP" ~ "TEMP (C)"
    ),
    LOW = ANRLO,
    HIGH = ANRHI,
    IND = ANRIND
  ) |> 
  group_by(PARAMCD) |> 
  mutate(LOW_coh = min(LOW),
         HIGH_coh = max(HIGH)) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  arrange(COHORT, Subject, PARAMCD, ADT, ADTM) |> 
  filter(!VISIT %in% c("Baseline", "Screening"))

vsdat <- vsdat |>
  left_join(select(exvis, Subject, EXSTDT, EXSTDTC, EXVISIT = VISIT, EXVISITNUM = VISITNUM),
            by = c("Subject", "ADT" = "EXSTDT")) |> 
  mutate(ASTDTM = ifelse(!is.na(EXSTDTC), convert_dtc_to_dtm(EXSTDTC), NA),
         VISITNUM = ifelse(grepl("unsch", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), EXVISITNUM, VISITNUM),
         VISIT = ifelse(grepl("unsch", VISIT, ignore.case = TRUE), EXVISIT, VISIT),
         AVISIT = VISIT, AVISITN = VISITNUM, ANRIND = IND, SUBJID = Subject,
         hours_since_inf_start = as.numeric(difftime(ADTM, ASTDTM, units = "hours")),
         hours_since_inf_start = ifelse(is.na(hours_since_inf_start), 0, hours_since_inf_start)
         )

# getting the last assessment before dosing
vsdat1 <- vsdat |> 
  arrange(Subject, PARAM, EXSTDTC, ADTM) |> 
  filter(VISIT == "BL" | ADTM < convert_dtc_to_dtm(EXSTDTC)) |> 
  group_by(Subject, PARAM, EXSTDTC) |> 
  slice_tail(n = 1) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  arrange(Subject, PARAM, VISITNUM)

cut_points <- c(0, 50, 98, 146)  # Start points of each group (last point is right endpoint)
labels <- c("Baseline - Visit 49", "Visits 50–97", "Visits 98–145")
vsdat1$VISITGP<- cut(vsdat1$VISITNUM, breaks = cut_points, labels = labels, right = FALSE, include.lowest = TRUE)

# vsdat49 <- vsdat |> filter(VISITNUM <= 49)
# 
# vsdat97 <- vsdat |> filter(VISITNUM > 49)

# Create the plot ------------------------------------------------------------
paramplot1 <- function(df, param){
  
  color_palette <- c(
    "#E69F00", # orange
    "#56B4E9", # sky blue
    "#009E73", # bluish green
    "#F0E442", # yellow
    "#0072B2", # blue
    "#D55E00", # vermillion
    "#CC79A7", # reddish purple
    "#999999", # grey
    "#332288", # dark blue
    "#88CCEE", # light blue
    "#44AA99", # green teal
    "#117733", # dark green
    "#DDCC77", # mustard
    "#AA4499", # magenta
    "#661100", # brown
    "#6699CC", # steel blue
    "#888888", # medium grey
    "#1B9E77", # teal green (from ColorBrewer)
    "#E7298A", # pink (from ColorBrewer)
    "#A6761D" # olive brown
  )
  
  temp_list <- list()
  plot_list <- list()
  
  df1 <- df |> 
    filter(PARAM %in% param)
  
  cohort <- unique(df1$COHORT)
  
  avisit_df <- data.frame(AVISITN = c(1:97)) |>
    mutate(
      AVISIT = paste0("Week ", AVISITN)
    )
  
  for (a in cohort) {
    vec_sorted <- unique(sort(df1$AVISITN[df1$COHORT == a]))
    sublists <- split(vec_sorted, ceiling(seq_along(vec_sorted) / 10))
    
    
    temp_list <- lapply(sublists, function(visit) {
      if (length(visit) < 10) {
        min_visit <- min(visit)
        max_visit <- max(visit)
        
        full_list <- seq(min_visit, min_visit + 9, by = 1)
        
        missing_visits <- full_list[!full_list %in% visit]
        
        filtered_anl <- filter(df1, AVISITN %in% visit, COHORT == a)
        avisit_modified <- expand.grid(
          SUBJID = filtered_anl$SUBJID,
          AVISITN = avisit_df$AVISITN[avisit_df$AVISITN %in% missing_visits]
        ) |>
          mutate(AVISIT = paste0("Week ", AVISITN), ANRIND = "NORMAL")
        
        filtered_df <- filtered_anl |>
          full_join(filter(avisit_modified, AVISITN %in% missing_visits))
        
        lev <- distinct(filtered_df, AVISIT, AVISITN) |> arrange(AVISITN) |> pull(AVISIT)
        
        filtered_df <- filtered_df |> 
          mutate(
            AVISIT = factor(AVISIT, levels = lev),
            ANRIND = factor(ANRIND, levels = c("HIGH", "NORMAL", "LOW"))
          ) |>
          arrange(SUBJID, hours_since_inf_start)
      } else {
        filtered_df <- filter(df1, AVISITN %in% visit, COHORT == a)
        
        lev <- distinct(filtered_df, AVISIT, AVISITN) |> arrange(AVISITN) |> pull(AVISIT)
        
        filtered_df <- filtered_df |>
          mutate(
            AVISIT = factor(AVISIT, levels = lev)
          ) |> 
          arrange(SUBJID, hours_since_inf_start)
      }
      
      n_subj <- length(unique(na.omit(filtered_df$SUBJID)))
      
      ggplot(filtered_df, aes(
        x = hours_since_inf_start,
        y = AVAL,
        group = SUBJID,
        color = SUBJID
      )) +
        geom_line() +
        geom_point(aes(shape = ANRIND), size = 5, show.legend = TRUE) +
        facet_wrap(~AVISIT, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1, strip.position = "left") +
        expand_limits(y = c(
          ceiling(min(df1$AVAL, na.rm = TRUE)) - 2,
          ceiling(max(df1$AVAL, na.rm = TRUE)) + 2
        )) +
        theme_bw(base_size = 16) +
        scale_y_continuous(
          limits = c(
            min(df1[["AVAL"]], na.rm = TRUE),
            max(df1[["AVAL"]], na.rm = TRUE)
          )
        ) +
        scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(floor(min(df1$hours_since_inf_start, na.rm = TRUE)),
                                        max(df1$hours_since_inf_start, na.rm = TRUE),
                                        by = 1
        )) +
        scale_color_manual(values = color_palette) +
        labs(
          x = "Hours from Start of Infusion",
          y = "Original Results",
          # y = unique(df1$PARAM),
          # title = args$title,
          subtitle = paste0(
            unique(filtered_df$COHORT), " (N=", n_subj, ") : W", min(filtered_df$AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE), "-W",
            max(filtered_df$AVISITN, na.rm = TRUE),
            " [", param, "]"
          ),
          # caption = args$footnote
        ) +
        scale_shape_manual(
          values = c(
            "HIGH" = 17,
            "NORMAL" = 16,
            "LOW" = 25
          ),
          drop = FALSE
        ) +
        theme(
          strip.placement = "outside",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
          strip.text.x = element_text(angle = 90),
          
          # titles / subtitles / caption
          plot.title    = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
          plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
          plot.caption  = element_text(size = 16),

          # axes
          axis.title    = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold"),
          axis.text     = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          
          # legend
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
          legend.text  = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.key.size = grid::unit(0.6, "cm")
          
        ) +
        guides(
          shape = guide_legend(order = 2, override.aes = list(linetype = NA)),
          color = guide_legend(order = 1, override.aes = list(shape = 15))
        )
    })
    
    plot_list <- c(plot_list, temp_list)
  }
  plot_list
}
```

### Diastolic Blood Pressure (mmHg)

**Cohort A1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1"), "DIABP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("DIABP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2"), "DIABP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("DIABP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

**Cohort A3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3"), "DIABP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("DIABP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1"), "DIABP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("DIABP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

### Systolic Blood Pressure (mmHg)

**Cohort A1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1"), "SYSBP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("SYSBP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2"), "SYSBP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("SYSBP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3"), "SYSBP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("SYSBP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort B1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1"), "SYSBP (mmHg)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("SYSBP (mmHg)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
```

\newpage

### Pulse (beats/min)

**Cohort A1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1"), "PULSE (beats/min)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("PULSE (beats/min)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2"), "PULSE (beats/min)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("PULSE (beats/min)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3"), "PULSE (beats/min)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("PULSE (beats/min)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort B1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1"), "PULSE (beats/min)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("PULSE (beats/min)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

### Pulse oximetry (spO2)

**Cohort A1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1"), "Pulse OX (spO2)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("Pulse OX (spO2)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2"), "Pulse OX (spO2)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("Pulse OX (spO2)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3"), "Pulse OX (spO2)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("Pulse OX (spO2)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort B1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1"), "Pulse OX (spO2)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("Pulse OX (spO2)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

### Temperature (C)

**Cohort A1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1"), "TEMP (C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("TEMP (C)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A2**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 8
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2"), "TEMP (C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A2") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("TEMP (C)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort A3**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3"), "TEMP (C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort A3") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("TEMP (C)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\newpage

**Cohort B1**

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 6
#| results: 'asis'
#| fig-show: asis
#| out-width: "\\linewidth"
#| fig-align: "center"

paramplot(vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1"), "TEMP (C)") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISITNUM) |> pull(),
                     labels = vsdat1 |> filter(COHORT == "Cohort B1") |> distinct(VISIT) |> pull(),
                     expand = expansion(mult = 0.01)) +
  facet_wrap(~ VISITGP, ncol = 1, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
      x = "Visit Name",
      y = stringr::str_wrap("TEMP (C)", 40L),
      title = NULL
    ) +
  plot_annotation(
    caption = "Data points represent the final assessment conducted before dosing.",
    theme = theme(
      plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10),
      plot.margin  = margin(t = 5.5, r = 5.5, b = 15, l = 5.5)
    )
  )
```

\elandscape
